light_analysis.result: 论文进行了定性评估，揭示了特征失败模式：在边界扰动下出现边界泄漏和误定位，在文本翻转下偶尔发生身份替换。比较分析显示不同学习策略展现出不同的鲁棒性特征，由前景-背景权衡控制，一些策略实现平衡性能，而其他优先前景准确性但牺牲背景精度。摘要未明确说明具体性能指标如准确率提升，但强调了鲁棒性分析的发现。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文的主要贡献包括首次系统研究基于动作的视频对象分割中的标签噪声问题，引入噪声类型、建立基准ActiSeg-NL并评估多种学习策略。提出的Parallel Mask Head Mechanism专门处理掩码标注噪声，增强了分割的鲁棒性。这项研究具有学术价值，推动了鲁棒机器学习方法在计算机视觉中的应用，并为体化智能提供了更可靠的解决方案。未来工作可能涉及扩展噪声类型或优化机制。

title: Enhancing Feature Fusion of U-like Networks with Dynamic Skip Connections
abstract: U-like networks have become fundamental frameworks in medical image segmentation through skip connections that bridge high-level semantics and low-level spatial details. Despite their success, conventional skip connections exhibit two key limitations: inter-feature constraints and intra-feature constraints. The inter-feature constraint refers to the static nature of feature fusion in traditional skip connections, where information is transmitted along fixed pathways regardless of feature content. The intra-feature constraint arises from the insufficient modeling of multi-scale feature interactions, thereby hindering the effective aggregation of global contextual information. To overcome these limitations, we propose a novel Dynamic Skip Connection (DSC) block that fundamentally enhances cross-layer connectivity through adaptive mechanisms. The DSC block integrates two complementary components. (1) Test-Time Training (TTT) module. This module addresses the inter-feature constraint by enabling dynamic adaptation of hidden representations during inference, facilitating content-aware feature refinement. (2) Dynamic Multi-Scale Kernel (DMSK) module. To mitigate the intra-feature constraint, this module adaptively selects kernel sizes based on global contextual cues, enhancing the network capacity for multi-scale feature integration. The DSC block is architecture-agnostic and can be seamlessly incorporated into existing U-like network structures. Extensive experiments demonstrate the plug-and-play effectiveness of the proposed DSC block across CNN-based, Transformer-based, hybrid CNN-Transformer, and Mamba-based U-like networks.

light_analysis.overview: 本研究提出动态跳过连接（DSC）块，通过自适应组件解决U-like网络特征融合的静态和多尺度问题，提升跨层连接性。
light_analysis.motivation: U-like网络在医学图像分割中至关重要，但传统跳过连接存在特征间约束（信息沿固定路径传输，缺乏适应性）和特征内约束（多尺度特征交互建模不足，阻碍全局上下文聚合）。这些限制影响特征融合效果，降低分割精度。因此，需要改进跳过连接的动态性和交互能力，以克服现有方法的不足。
light_analysis.method: 提出动态跳过连接（DSC）块，包含两个互补组件：(1) 测试时间训练（TTT）模块：在推理时动态适应隐藏表示，实现内容感知特征精炼，解决特征间约束。(2) 动态多尺度核（DMSK）模块：基于全局上下文线索自适应选择核大小，增强多尺度特征集成，解决特征内约束。该块设计为架构无关，可无缝集成到基于CNN、Transformer、混合CNN-Transformer和Mamba的U-like网络中。
light_analysis.result: 广泛实验表明，DSC块在多种U-like网络中展现即插即用有效性，包括CNN-based、Transformer-based、hybrid CNN-Transformer和Mamba-based架构。摘要未明确说明具体性能指标如准确率提升，但实验结果证明了DSC块能克服传统跳过连接的局限性，提升特征融合能力。与基线方法对比，DSC块增强了网络的适应性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文通过提出DSC块解决了U-like网络中跳过连接的静态和多尺度问题，显著增强了特征融合。研究具有重要学术价值，为改进医学图像分割模型提供了新方法；其架构无关性便于实际应用。潜在局限性或未来工作摘要未明确说明，但可能包括更广泛的场景应用或进一步优化自适应机制。

title: MultiWikiQA: A Reading Comprehension Benchmark in 300+ Languages
abstract: We introduce a new reading comprehension dataset, dubbed MultiWikiQA, which covers 306 languages and has 1,220,757 samples in total. We start with Wikipedia articles, which also provide the context for the dataset samples, and use an LLM to generate question/answer pairs related to the Wikipedia article, ensuring that the answer appears verbatim within the article. Next, the question is then rephrased to hinder simple word matching methods from performing well on the dataset. We conduct a crowdsourced human evaluation of the fluency of the generated questions, which included 156 respondents across 30 of the languages (both low- and high-resource). All 30 languages received a mean fluency rating above ``mostly natural'', showing that the samples are of good quality. We evaluate 6 different language models, both decoder and encoder models of varying sizes, showing that the benchmark is sufficiently difficult and that there is a large performance discrepancy amongst the languages. Both the dataset and survey evaluations are publicly available.

light_analysis.overview: 本论文提出了一个覆盖306种语言的大规模阅读理解数据集MultiWikiQA，并通过人工评估和模型测试验证了其高质量和挑战性。
light_analysis.motivation: 研究动机是解决多语言自然语言处理中缺乏大规模、高质量阅读理解基准的问题。现有数据集往往局限于高资源语言，限制了模型在低资源语言上的评估和改进。该研究旨在创建一个覆盖广泛语言、设计精良的数据集，以促进跨语言NLP研究，并避免简单词匹配方法的影响，提升评估的真实性和难度。
light_analysis.method: 研究方法基于Wikipedia文章构建数据集，使用大型语言模型（LLM）生成与文章相关的问题/答案对，确保答案在文章中准确出现，并对问题进行重述以增加理解难度。通过人群来源的人工评估，邀请156名受访者对30种语言（包括低资源和高资源）的样本进行流利度评级，以验证数据质量。数据集和评估过程公开可用。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果显示，人工评估中所有30种语言的平均流利度评级高于“mostly natural”，表明样本质量良好。评估6种不同尺寸的解码器和编码器语言模型发现，基准测试具有足够难度，且不同语言间的性能存在显著差异，突显了多语言阅读理解的挑战性，并为模型比较和改进提供了数据支持。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献是推出了MultiWikiQA数据集，这是一个高质量、大规模的多语言阅读理解基准。该数据集通过LLM生成和问题重述确保了挑战性，公开可用支持了NLP社区的研究。学术价值在于提供了标准化评估平台，实际应用有助于推动语言模型在低资源语言上的发展，未来工作可扩展语言覆盖或优化数据生成方法。

title: A Geometric Perspective on the Difficulties of Learning GNN-based SAT Solvers
abstract: Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) have gathered increasing interest as learnable solvers of Boolean Satisfiability Problems (SATs), operating on graph representations of logical formulas. However, their performance degrades sharply on harder and more constrained instances, raising questions about architectural limitations. In this paper, we work towards a geometric explanation built upon graph Ricci Curvature (RC). We prove that bipartite graphs derived from random k-SAT formulas are inherently negatively curved, and that this curvature decreases with instance difficulty. Given that negative graph RC indicates local connectivity bottlenecks, we argue that GNN solvers are affected by oversquashing, a phenomenon where long-range dependencies become impossible to compress into fixed-length representations. We validate our claims empirically across different SAT benchmarks and confirm that curvature is both a strong indicator of problem complexity and can be used to predict generalization error. Finally, we connect our findings to the design of existing solvers and outline promising directions for future work.
comment: Accepted in the Proceedings track of the GRaM Workshop @ ICLR 2026

light_analysis.overview: 本文通过图 Ricci 曲率的几何分析，揭示了 GNN-based SAT 求解器在难实例上性能下降的 oversquashing 现象，为改进求解器设计提供了新视角。
light_analysis.motivation: GNNs 作为可学习的布尔可满足性问题（SAT）求解器，因其在图表示上的有效性而受到关注，但在处理更困难和受约束的 SAT 实例时，性能会急剧下降，这暴露出潜在的架构局限性。现有方法通常缺乏对问题几何结构的深入理解，无法解释这种性能退化，阻碍了求解器的进一步优化。因此，本研究旨在通过几何视角来探究这些困难的根本原因，以弥补理论和实践之间的差距。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出基于图 Ricci Curvature (RC) 的几何分析方法来解释 GNN-based SAT 求解器的性能问题。核心创新点在于证明从随机 k-SAT 公式派生的二分图具有固有负曲率，且曲率随实例难度增加而减小。这关联到 oversquashing 现象，即长距离依赖无法压缩到固定长度表示中，导致 GNN 信息传递受限。方法包括理论推导和在不同 SAT 基准测试上的实证验证，以支持几何解释的有效性。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果表明，图 Ricci 曲率是 SAT 问题复杂性的强指标，能够有效预测 GNN 求解器的泛化误差。通过在不同难度的 SAT 实例上测试，发现曲率与求解器性能呈负相关，从而验证了 oversquashing 作为性能下降原因的假设。尽管摘要未提供具体的准确率数据，但证实了曲率分析在解释和预测性能退化方面的实用性，为未来改进提供了数据支撑。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究的主要贡献是引入了图 Ricci 曲率的几何框架，系统解释了 GNN-based SAT 求解器在难实例上的性能限制，学术上深化了对 GNN 架构局限性的理解，实际应用中有助于设计更鲁棒的求解器。局限性在于可能未覆盖所有 SAT 变体，未来工作可扩展曲率分析到其他组合优化问题或开发缓解 oversquashing 的新方法。

title: ROBUST-MIPS: A Combined Skeletal Pose and Instance Segmentation Dataset for Laparoscopic Surgical Instruments
abstract: Localisation of surgical tools constitutes a foundational building block for computer-assisted interventional technologies. Works in this field typically focus on training deep learning models to perform segmentation tasks. Performance of learning-based approaches is limited by the availability of diverse annotated data. We argue that skeletal pose annotations are a more efficient annotation approach for surgical tools, striking a balance between richness of semantic information and ease of annotation, thus allowing for accelerated growth of available annotated data. To encourage adoption of this annotation style, we present, ROBUST-MIPS, a combined tool pose and tool instance segmentation dataset derived from the existing ROBUST-MIS dataset. Our enriched dataset facilitates the joint study of these two annotation styles and allow head-to-head comparison on various downstream tasks. To demonstrate the adequacy of pose annotations for surgical tool localisation, we set up a simple benchmark using popular pose estimation methods and observe high-quality results. To ease adoption, together with the dataset, we release our benchmark models and custom tool pose annotation software.

light_analysis.overview: 论文提出了ROBUST-MIPS数据集，结合骨骼姿势和实例分割，证明了姿势注释在手术工具本地化中的高效性。
light_analysis.motivation: 研究动机源于手术工具本地化在计算机辅助干预中的基础作用，但现有深度学习分割方法受限于注释数据的多样性。传统注释方法耗时费力，数据稀缺限制模型性能。作者指出骨骼姿势注释能更高效地平衡语义信息丰富度和注释便利性，从而加速注释数据增长，解决数据瓶颈问题，推动相关技术发展。
light_analysis.method: 研究方法包括创建ROBUST-MIPS数据集，基于现有ROBUST-MIS数据集添加骨骼姿势注释，实现工具姿势与实例分割的融合。关键创新在于促进两种注释风格的联合研究，并设置基准使用流行姿势估计方法进行评估。技术细节涵盖数据集增强、下游任务头对头比较，并发布了自定义工具姿势注释软件，简化数据创建过程。
light_analysis.result: 主要实验结果显示，通过流行姿势估计方法，在手术工具本地化任务中取得了高质量结果，证明了姿势注释的充分性。摘要未明确具体性能指标，但基于基准测试表明姿势注释能有效替代或补充分割方法，促进更高效的数据利用，为下游任务提供新基准。
light_analysis.conclusion: 结论总结了论文通过数据集、基准模型和软件推动了骨骼姿势注释在手术工具本地化中的应用，加速数据增长和模型训练。研究价值在于提高注释效率和促进计算机辅助干预技术发展。未来工作可能涉及扩展数据集规模或验证更多应用场景，摘要未明确说明局限性。

title: Adaptive Quantized Planetary Crater Detection System for Autonomous Space Exploration
abstract: Autonomous planetary exploration demands real-time, high-fidelity environmental perception. Standard deep learning models, however, require far more memory and compute than space-qualified, radiation-hardened, power-optimized hardware can provide. This limitation creates a severe design bottleneck. Engineers struggle to deploy sophisticated detection architectures without overloading the strict power and memory limits of onboard computers of outer space planetary exploration platforms.   In this foundational concept paper, we propose the Adaptive Quantized Planetary Crater Detection System (AQ-PCDSys) to resolve this bottleneck. We present an architectural blueprint integrating a Quantized Neural Network (QNN), refined through Quantization Aware Training (QAT), with an Adaptive Multi-Sensor Fusion (AMF) module and Multi-Scale Detection Heads. By forcing weights into low-precision integer arithmetic during the training and optimization phase, our framework strips away the floating-point overhead that typically overwhelms onboard computer's processors. The AMF module directly addresses sensor fragility. It dynamically selects and fuses Optical Imagery (OI) and Digital Elevation Models (DEMs) at the feature level to provide reliable sensor inputs during extreme cross-illuminations and sudden sensor dropouts. As a concept paper, this work establishes the technical and mathematical justifications for the architecture rather than presenting completed empirical ablation studies. We outline a rigorous Hardware-in-the-Loop (HITL) evaluation protocol for immediate future validation, paving the way for next-generation, hardware-aware space-mission software.
comment: 10 pages, 6 figures. A research paper on a novel deep learning framework for planetary crater detection

light_analysis.overview: 提出自适应量化行星陨石坑检测系统，结合量化神经网络和自适应传感器融合，解决太空探索硬件限制下的实时环境感知瓶颈。
light_analysis.motivation: 本研究针对自主行星探索中，标准深度学习模型在太空平台硬件（如辐射硬化、功耗优化计算机）上部署时面临的内存和计算资源不足问题。太空硬件的严格功率和内存限制，导致工程师难以应用复杂检测架构，阻碍了实时、高保真的环境感知，影响探索任务的自主性和可靠性。现有方法因资源消耗大，无法适应太空环境，因此亟需优化方案。
light_analysis.method: 方法包括集成量化神经网络，通过量化感知训练将权重转换为低精度整数，以减少浮点计算开销。结合自适应多传感器融合模块，在特征级别动态选择并融合光学图像和数字高程模型，以应对极端光照变化和传感器故障，确保输入可靠性。使用多尺度检测头提高检测精度，整体架构为硬件感知设计，优化太空平台的资源利用。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确说明实验结果，作为概念论文，研究重点在于技术论证和架构设计，未提供具体性能指标（如准确率或效率提升）或与基线方法的对比。论文概述了硬件在环评估协议，为未来实证验证奠定基础，但尚未完成完整实验。
light_analysis.conclusion: 主要贡献是提出了AQ-PCDSys的架构和技术原理，通过量化技术和传感器融合解决太空探索的计算瓶颈。研究意义在于为硬件感知的太空任务软件开发铺路，推动自主系统的实际应用。局限性在于缺乏实证研究，未来工作可通过硬件在环协议验证系统性能，并进一步优化模型。

title: Stochastic Self-Guidance for Training-Free Enhancement of Diffusion Models
abstract: Classifier-free Guidance (CFG) is a widely used technique in modern diffusion models for enhancing sample quality and prompt adherence. However, through an empirical analysis on Gaussian mixture modeling with a closed-form solution, we observe a discrepancy between the suboptimal results produced by CFG and the ground truth. The model's excessive reliance on these suboptimal predictions often leads to semantic incoherence and low-quality outputs. To address this issue, we first empirically demonstrate that the model's suboptimal predictions can be effectively refined using sub-networks of the model itself. Building on this insight, we propose S$^2$-Guidance, a novel method that leverages stochastic block-dropping during the forward process to construct stochastic sub-networks, effectively guiding the model away from potential low-quality predictions and toward high-quality outputs. Extensive qualitative and quantitative experiments on text-to-image and text-to-video generation tasks demonstrate that S$^2$-Guidance delivers superior performance, consistently surpassing CFG and other advanced guidance strategies. Our code will be released.

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出S^2-Guidance，一种基于随机子网络的训练免费增强方法，用于提升扩散模型的输出质量。
light_analysis.motivation: 该研究旨在解决扩散模型中广泛使用的Classifier-free Guidance (CFG)技术存在的不足，通过高斯混合建模的实证分析发现，CFG产生次优结果，导致输出语义不连贯和质量低下。由于扩散模型在图像和视频生成任务中应用广泛，优化指导策略对提升性能至关重要，现有CFG方法过度依赖不准确预测，亟需改进以避免低质量输出，影响实际应用效果。
light_analysis.method: 方法基于实证观察，模型自身的子网络可精炼次优预测。核心创新是S^2-Guidance，利用随机块丢弃技术在前向过程中构建随机子网络，这些网络动态引导模型远离潜在低质量预测，无需额外训练即可增强扩散模型。该方法直接应用于现有扩散模型，适用于文本到图像和文本到视频生成任务，通过子网络自我引导实现高效优化。
light_analysis.result: 通过广泛定性和定量实验，S^2-Guidance在文本到图像和文本到视频生成任务中展现出卓越性能，持续超越CFG及其他先进指导策略。实验结果表明，该方法在提升样本质量和提示遵循方面有效，验证了其作为增强技术的实用性，尽管摘要未提供具体指标数据，但性能对比证实了改进效果。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献是S^2-Guidance方法，通过随机子网络实现训练免费增强，改进了扩散模型的指导策略。这为扩散模型优化提供了新思路，具有学术创新性，并在实际应用中能显著提升图像和视频生成的质量。未来工作可探索在其他生成模型上的应用或进一步优化子网络构建技术。

title: GaitSnippet: Gait Recognition Beyond Unordered Sets and Ordered Sequences
abstract: Recent advancements in gait recognition have significantly enhanced performance by treating silhouettes as either an unordered set or an ordered sequence. However, both set-based and sequence-based approaches exhibit notable limitations. Specifically, set-based methods tend to overlook short-range temporal context for individual frames, while sequence-based methods struggle to capture long-range temporal dependencies effectively. To address these challenges, we draw inspiration from human identification and propose a new perspective that conceptualizes human gait as a composition of individualized actions. Each action is represented by a series of frames, randomly selected from a continuous segment of the sequence, which we term a snippet. Fundamentally, the collection of snippets for a given sequence enables the incorporation of multi-scale temporal context, facilitating more comprehensive gait feature learning. Moreover, we introduce a non-trivial solution for snippet-based gait recognition, focusing on Snippet Sampling and Snippet Modeling as key components. Extensive experiments on four widely-used gait datasets validate the effectiveness of our proposed approach and, more importantly, highlight the potential of gait snippets. For instance, our method achieves the rank-1 accuracy of 77.5% on Gait3D and 81.7% on GREW using a 2D convolution-based backbone.

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出GaitSnippet方法，通过将步态视为片段组合，有效融合多尺度时间上下文，克服现有无序集和有序序列方法的局限性。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有步态识别方法将步态轮廓视为无序集或有序序列，但基于集的方法忽略短时上下文，基于序列的方法难以捕获长时依赖，限制了性能，因为步态具有多尺度时间特征。这问题重要，因为准确步态识别对身份验证等应用有价值。摘要未明确说明现有方法的具体不足之处，但指出需要新视角来解决时间上下文融合的挑战。
light_analysis.method: 方法将步态视为个性化动作的组合，每个动作由snippet表示，snippet是从连续序列中随机选取的帧序列。核心组件包括Snippet Sampling（生成片段）和Snippet Modeling（建模片段特征），使用基于2D卷积的骨干网络提取特征。通过片段集合融入多尺度时间上下文，增强步态特征学习，关键创新点是结合短时和长时依赖。
light_analysis.result: 在四个广泛使用的步态数据集上验证方法，例如在Gait3D数据集上达到77.5% rank-1准确率，在GREW数据集上达到81.7% rank-1准确率，展示了有效性和snippet的潜力。摘要未明确说明与基线方法的详细对比，但通过具体数据表明性能提升，强调了多尺度上下文融合的优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文贡献是提出新视角，将步态识别扩展为片段组合，解决了时间上下文问题，验证了GaitSnippet方法的有效性。学术价值在于为步态识别提供创新方向，应用价值在于提高识别准确率。未来工作可优化片段采样和建模，或扩展到其他数据集和任务，摘要未明确说明局限性。

title: ObfusQAte: A Proposed Framework to Evaluate LLM Robustness on Obfuscated Factual Question Answering
abstract: The rapid proliferation of Large Language Models (LLMs) has significantly contributed to the development of equitable AI systems capable of factual question-answering (QA). However, no known study tests the LLMs' robustness when presented with obfuscated versions of questions. To systematically evaluate these limitations, we propose a novel technique, ObfusQAte, and leveraging the same, introduce ObfusQA, a comprehensive, first-of-its-kind framework with multi-tiered obfuscation levels designed to examine LLM capabilities across three distinct dimensions: (i) Named-Entity Indirection, (ii) Distractor Indirection, and (iii) Contextual Overload. By capturing these fine-grained distinctions in language, ObfusQA provides a comprehensive benchmark for evaluating LLM robustness and adaptability. Our study observes that LLMs exhibit a tendency to fail or generate hallucinated responses when confronted with these increasingly nuanced variations. To foster research in this direction, we make ObfusQAte publicly available.

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出ObfusQAte框架，首次系统评估大型语言模型在混淆事实问答中的鲁棒性。
light_analysis.motivation: 大型语言模型在公平AI系统中广泛用于事实问答，但现有研究未测试其对混淆版本问题的鲁棒性。混淆问题在现实场景中常见，如输入噪声或故意误导，可能影响模型的可靠性和公平性，揭示现有方法在语言变体处理上的不足，因此系统评估至关重要以识别潜在漏洞。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出ObfusQAte技术和ObfusQA框架，通过多层级混淆评估大型语言模型能力。框架涵盖三个维度：Named-Entity Indirection（间接命名实体）、Distractor Indirection（干扰项间接）和Contextual Overload（上下文过载），旨在捕捉语言细微区别。关键创新点是首次提供一个全面基准，系统测试模型在不同混淆水平下的适应性；摘要未明确说明具体数据集或模型架构细节。
light_analysis.result: 实验观察到大型语言模型在面对混淆问题时容易失败或产生幻觉响应，表明其对语言变体的鲁棒性存在缺陷。具体性能指标如准确率或效率改进在摘要中未提及，与基线方法的对比也未详细说明，但结果突显了模型在混淆问答任务中的弱点，强调了进一步改进的需求。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文的主要贡献是提出了ObfusQAte框架，为评估大型语言模型在混淆事实问答中的鲁棒性提供了一个新颖基准。学术价值在于填补研究空白，促进鲁棒性领域探索；实际应用价值在于帮助开发更可靠的AI系统。框架已公开可用，支持未来研究，潜在局限性可能包括混淆维度的扩展或更广泛验证。

title: SEVADE: Self-Evolving Multi-Agent Analysis with Decoupled Evaluation for Hallucination-Resistant Irony Detection
abstract: Sarcasm detection is a crucial yet challenging Natural Language Processing task. Existing Large Language Model methods are often limited by single-perspective analysis, static reasoning pathways, and a susceptibility to hallucination when processing complex ironic rhetoric, which impacts their accuracy and reliability. To address these challenges, we propose **SEVADE**, a novel **S**elf-**Ev**olving multi-agent **A**nalysis framework with **D**ecoupled **E**valuation for hallucination-resistant sarcasm detection. The core of our framework is a Dynamic Agentive Reasoning Engine (DARE), which utilizes a team of specialized agents grounded in linguistic theory to perform a multifaceted deconstruction of the text and generate a structured reasoning chain. Subsequently, a separate lightweight rationale adjudicator (RA) performs the final classification based solely on this reasoning chain. This decoupled architecture is designed to mitigate the risk of hallucination by separating complex reasoning from the final judgment. Extensive experiments on four benchmark datasets demonstrate that our framework achieves state-of-the-art performance, with average improvements of **6.75%** in Accuracy and **6.29%** in Macro-F1 score.

light_analysis.overview: 本论文提出了SEVADE框架，通过自我演进的多代理分析和解耦评估，有效提升反语检测的准确性和抗幻觉能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 反语检测是自然语言处理中的重要任务，但在处理复杂反语时面临挑战。现有基于大型语言模型的方法常采用单视角分析和静态推理路径，导致易产生幻觉，影响准确性和可靠性。这些问题限制了模型在真实场景中的适用性，因此需要开发新方法来克服这些局限，提升检测性能并减少幻觉风险。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出SEVADE框架，核心是动态代理推理引擎（DARE），该引擎利用基于语言学理论的专门代理团队对文本进行多角度解构，生成结构化推理链。随后，独立的轻量级理由裁决器（RA）仅基于推理链进行最终分类，实现推理与判断的解耦。这种架构旨在通过分离复杂分析和最终决策来降低幻觉风险，摘要未明确说明具体数据集，但提及使用了四个基准数据集进行实验。
light_analysis.result: 在四个基准数据集上的实验表明，SEVADE框架达到了最先进的性能，平均准确率提高了6.75%，Macro-F1分数提高了6.29%。这些改进显著优于现有基线方法，验证了框架在反语检测任务中的有效性，特别是在提升准确性和减少幻觉方面的优势。结果突显了多代理分析和解耦评估在改善检测可靠性方面的作用。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献是提出了SEVADE框架，它通过自我演进的多代理分析和解耦评估，成功提升了反语检测的性能和抗幻觉能力。该框架为自然语言处理中的复杂推理任务提供了新思路，具有重要学术价值，可能推动多代理系统在NLP领域的应用。实际应用方面，可改善社交媒体分析等场景的准确性；未来工作可探索更多代理类型、扩展到其他任务或优化计算效率。

title: ToolVQA: A Dataset for Multi-step Reasoning VQA with External Tools
abstract: Integrating external tools into Large Foundation Models (LFMs) has emerged as a promising approach to enhance their problem-solving capabilities. While existing studies have demonstrated strong performance in tool-augmented Visual Question Answering (VQA), recent benchmarks reveal significant gaps in real-world tool-use proficiency, particularly in functionally diverse multimodal settings requiring multi-step reasoning. In this work, we introduce ToolVQA, a large-scale multimodal dataset comprising 23K instances, designed to bridge this gap. Unlike previous datasets that rely on synthetic scenarios and simplified queries, ToolVQA features real-world visual contexts and challenging implicit multi-step reasoning tasks, better aligning with real user interactions. To construct this dataset, we propose ToolEngine, a novel data generation pipeline that employs Depth-First Search (DFS) with a dynamic in-context example matching mechanism to simulate human-like tool-use reasoning. ToolVQA encompasses 10 multimodal tools across 7 diverse task domains, with an average inference length of 2.78 reasoning steps per instance. The fine-tuned 7B LFMs on ToolVQA not only achieve impressive performance on our test set but also surpass the large close-sourced model GPT-3.5-turbo on various out-of-distribution (OOD) datasets, demonstrating strong generalizability to real-world tool-use scenarios.

light_analysis.overview: 该论文提出了一个名为ToolVQA的大规模多模态数据集及其生成管道ToolEngine，以增强大基础模型在真实世界多步推理视觉问答中的工具使用能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 整合外部工具到大基础模型（LFMs）已被证明能提升问题解决能力，但现有工具增强视觉问答（VQA）基准在真实世界多模态环境中的工具使用熟练度存在显著差距，特别是涉及隐式多步推理的场景。这些数据集往往依赖合成场景和简化查询，未能有效模拟复杂用户交互的多样性，限制了模型在实际应用中的适应性和性能。因此，需要开发更逼真的数据集来填补这一空白，以促进模型在真实世界任务中的工具集成能力。
light_analysis.method: 论文引入了ToolVQA数据集，包含23K个真实世界视觉和多步推理实例，覆盖10个多模态工具和7个不同任务领域，平均每个实例有2.78个推理步骤。为构建该数据集，设计了ToolEngine数据生成管道，采用深度优先搜索（DFS）结合动态上下文示例匹配机制，模拟人类工具使用推理过程，确保任务的复杂性和真实性。这一方法通过自动生成挑战性隐式推理任务，避免了传统数据集的简化假设。
light_analysis.result: 在ToolVQA数据集上微调的7B参数大基础模型在测试集上表现优异，平均推理步骤为2.78，显示出强大的问题解决能力。更关键的是，该模型在多个分布外（OOD）数据集上超越了大型闭源模型GPT-3.5-turbo，例如在泛化测试中展示出更高的准确率和适应性，表明ToolVQA有效提升了模型对真实世界工具使用场景的泛化性能，验证了数据集的实用价值。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献在于创建了ToolVQA数据集和ToolEngine管道，填补了多模态工具增强VQA在真实世界多步推理中的空白，增强了模型的泛化能力。其学术价值在于提供了逼真的基准测试，推动了大基础模型工具集成技术的发展，实际应用潜力包括智能助手和复杂问题解决系统。未来工作可扩展到更多工具类型和任务领域，以进一步提升模型的适应性和鲁棒性。

title: Towards Generalizable AI-Generated Image Detection via Image-Adaptive Prompt Learning
abstract: In AI-generated image detection, current cutting-edge methods typically adapt pre-trained foundation models through partial-parameter fine-tuning. However, these approaches often struggle to generalize to forgeries from unseen generators, as the fine-tuned models capture only limited patterns from training data and fail to reflect the evolving traits of new ones. To overcome this limitation, we propose Image-Adaptive Prompt Learning (IAPL), a novel paradigm that dynamically adjusts the prompts fed into the encoder according to each testing image, rather than fixing them after training. This design significantly enhances robustness and adaptability to diverse forged images. The dynamic prompts integrate conditional information with test-time adaptive tokens through a lightweight learnable scaling factor. The conditional information is produced by a Conditional Information Learner, which leverages CNN-based feature extractors to model both forgery-specific and general conditions. The test-time adaptive tokens are optimized during inference on a single sample by enforcing prediction consistency across multiple views, ensuring that the parameters align with the current image. For the final decision, the optimal input with the highest prediction confidence is selected. Extensive experiments show that IAPL achieves state-of-the-art performance, with mean accuracies of 95.61% and 96.7% on the widely used UniversalFakeDetect and GenImage datasets, respectively. Codes and weights will be released on https://github.com/liyih/IAPL.

light_analysis.overview: 本论文提出图像自适应提示学习（IAPL），通过动态调整提示增强AI生成图像检测的泛化性。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前AI生成图像检测方法主要基于预训练基础模型的参数微调，但这种方法泛化能力有限，难以检测来自未见生成器的伪造图像。随着AI生成技术的快速发展，新生成器不断涌现，微调模型仅能捕捉训练数据中的有限模式，无法反映新生成器的演化特征，导致检测性能下降。因此，开发能适应多样化伪造图像的通用检测方法具有重要研究价值，以应对实际应用中不断变化的生成场景。
light_analysis.method: 本研究提出图像自适应提示学习（IAPL），一种新范式，通过动态调整输入编码器的提示来适应每个测试图像，而非在训练后固定提示。该方法集成了条件信息与测试时自适应令牌，通过轻量级学习缩放因子实现。条件信息由条件信息学习器生成，该学习器利用基于CNN的特征提取器建模伪造特定和一般条件。测试时自适应令牌在推理时通过对单个样本的多个视图进行预测一致性优化，确保参数与当前图像对齐，最终选择预测置信度最高的输入进行决策。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果显示，IAPL在UniversalFakeDetect数据集上达到95.61%的平均准确率，在GenImage数据集上达到96.7%，实现了最先进的性能。与基线方法相比，IAPL在处理未见生成器的伪造图像时表现出更强的鲁棒性和泛化能力，验证了其在实际检测任务中的高效性。大量实验证明该方法能有效适应多样化伪造图像，提升了检测准确率。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献是提出图像自适应提示学习（IAPL），通过动态提示调整增强了AI生成图像检测的泛化性和适应性。IAPL不仅提高了检测性能，还为应对不断演化的生成器提供了新思路，具有重要学术和实际价值。未来工作可能包括优化计算效率、扩展到其他检测领域或处理更复杂的生成场景，以进一步提升方法的适用性。

title: WebDS: An End-to-End Benchmark for Web-based Data Science
abstract: Many real-world data science tasks involve complex web-based interactions: finding appropriate data available on the internet, synthesizing multimodal data from different locations, and producing summarized analyses. Existing web benchmarks often focus on simplistic interactions and often do not require diverse tool-using capabilities. Conversely, traditional data science benchmarks typically concentrate on static, highly structured datasets and do not assess end-to-end workflows that encompass data acquisition, cleaning, analysis, and insight generation. In response, we introduce WebDS, the first end-to-end web-based data science benchmark. It comprises 870 web-based data science tasks across 29 diverse websites from structured government data portals to unstructured news media, challenging agents to perform complex, multi-step, tool-based operations, across heterogeneous data formats, to better reflect the realities of modern data analytics. Evaluations of current SOTA LLM agents indicate significant performance gaps in accomplishing these tasks. For instance, Browser Use, which accomplishes $80\%$ of tasks on WebVoyager, completes only 15% of tasks in WebDS, which our analysis suggests is due to new failure modes, such as poor information grounding, repetitive behavior and shortcut-taking that agents performing WebDS's tasks display. By contrast, humans achieve around 90% accuracy, highlighting a substantial gap between current agents and human performance. By providing a more robust and realistic testing ground, WebDS sets the stage for significant advances in the development of practically useful LLM-based data science.

light_analysis.overview: 论文提出了首个端到端的基于网络的数据科学基准WebDS，用于评估大型语言模型代理在复杂数据科学任务中的性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 现实世界的数据科学任务常涉及复杂的网络交互，如数据获取、多模态数据合成和分析生成，但现有基准存在不足：网络基准过于简单，不评估多样化的工具使用能力；传统数据科学基准则专注于静态数据集，缺乏对端到端工作流的评估。这导致无法真实反映现代数据分析的实际需求，因此开发一个更健壮和真实的测试环境至关重要。
light_analysis.method: WebDS基准包含870个基于网络的数据科学任务，覆盖29个不同网站，从结构化政府数据门户到非结构化新闻媒体。任务设计为复杂、多步骤的操作，要求代理使用工具处理异构数据格式，以模拟真实的数据科学工作流。关键创新在于首次提供端到端的评估框架，强调真实性和多工具交互能力。
light_analysis.result: 实验评估当前SOTA LLM代理在WebDS上的表现，显示显著性能差距。例如，Browser Use代理在WebVoyager基准上完成80%任务，但在WebDS上仅完成15%任务，分析指出新失败模式如信息基础差、重复行为和捷径。相比之下，人类准确率达90%，突显代理与人类性能的巨大差距，验证了基准的挑战性。
light_analysis.conclusion: WebDS为基于LLM的数据科学发展提供了更真实的测试平台，填补了现有基准的不足。其学术价值在于推动复杂任务评估和代理能力研究，实际应用有助于开发实用数据科学代理。未来工作可聚焦于改进代理在信息基础和工具使用方面的能力，以缩小与人类性能的差距。

title: Self-Supervised Inductive Logic Programming
abstract: Inductive Logic Programming (ILP) approaches like Meta \-/ Interpretive Learning (MIL) can learn, from few examples, recursive logic programs with invented predicates that generalise well to unseen instances. This ability relies on a background theory and negative examples, both carefully selected with expert knowledge of a learning problem and its solutions. But what if such a problem-specific background theory or negative examples are not available? We formalise this question as a new setting for Self-Supervised ILP and present a new MIL algorithm that learns in the new setting from some positive labelled, and zero or more unlabelled examples, and automatically generates, and labels, new positive and negative examples during learning. We implement this algorithm in Prolog in a new MIL system, called Poker. We compare Poker to state-of-the-art MIL system Louise on experiments learning grammars for Context-Free and L-System languages from labelled, positive example strings, no negative examples, and just the terminal vocabulary of a language, seen in examples, as a first-order background theory. We introduce a new approach for the principled selection of a second-order background theory as a Second Order Definite Normal Form (SONF), sufficiently general to learn all programs in a class, thus removing the need for a backgound theory tailored to a learning task. We find that Poker's performance improves with increasing numbers of automatically generated examples while Louise, bereft of negative examples, over-generalises.
comment: To appear in AAAI-26 conference proceedings. Updated 04 March 2026 to include appendices, update affiliation, contact details

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出了一种自监督归纳逻辑编程算法，通过自动生成和标记示例，在无特定背景理论和负例的情况下学习逻辑程序。
light_analysis.motivation: 传统归纳逻辑编程（ILP）方法如元解释学习（MIL）依赖专家知识来提供背景理论和负例，以实现从少数示例中学习递归逻辑程序。这在实际问题中限制了应用，因为背景理论和负例可能不可得或难以获取。论文形式化了自监督ILP的新设置，旨在解决这一问题，使学习过程更加自适应和通用，无需人工干预。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出了一种新的元解释学习（MIL）算法，在自监督设置下从正标记和零个或更多未标记示例中学习逻辑程序。关键创新包括自动生成并标记正例和负例的机制，以及引入第二阶正定范式（SONF）作为通用背景理论，消除了对特定任务背景理论的需求。算法实现在名为Poker的新系统中，用Prolog编写，并在实验中使用上下文无关和L-系统语言作为学习任务，仅基于正例字符串和终端词汇。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果显示，Poker的性能随着自动生成示例数量的增加而提升，表明其在自监督设置下能够有效学习。相比之下，现有的MIL系统Louise在没有负例时过度泛化，表现不佳。这验证了所提出方法在缺乏传统学习资源时的优越性，尽管摘要未提供具体性能指标如准确率，但通过对比强调了新算法的稳健性和适应性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文的主要贡献在于形式化自监督ILP并开发了相应的算法，扩展了ILP的应用范围，使其在无需专家知识的情况下也能有效学习。该研究具有重要学术价值，提升了ILP的自主性和实用性，适用于更多实际场景，如自然语言处理和知识推理。未来工作可进一步探索SONF在其他领域的应用或改进示例生成策略。

title: From Privacy to Trust in the Agentic Era: A Taxonomy of Challenges in Trustworthy Federated Learning Through the Lens of Trust Report 2.0
abstract: Federated Learning (FL) enables privacy-preserving collaborative learning, yet deployments increasingly show that privacy guarantees alone do not sustain trust in high-risk settings. As FL systems move toward agentic AI, large language model-enabled, and dynamically adaptive architectures, trustworthiness becomes a system-level problem shaped by autonomous decision-making, non-stationary environments, and multi-stakeholder governance. We argue for Trustworthy FL (TFL), treating trust as a continuously maintained operating condition rather than a static model property. Through the lens of Trust Report 2.0, we propose a requirement-driven taxonomy of challenges grounded in TAI and explicitly extended to account for control-plane decisions, agency, and system dynamics across the federated lifecycle. Building on this diagnosis, we introduce a coordination blueprint that structures cross-requirement trade-offs, decision justification, and governance alignment in TFL systems. To operationalize assurance, Trust Report 2.0 is instantiated as a lightweight, privacy-preserving artifact that surfaces decision-centric trust evidence without centralizing raw data. We illustrate applicability via healthcare as a stress-test domain, focusing on oncology FL under regulatory pressure and clinical risk.

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出可信联邦学习（TFL）概念，通过Trust Report 2.0构建挑战分类法和协调蓝图，以增强高风险联邦学习系统的系统级信任。
light_analysis.motivation: 联邦学习（FL）虽然支持隐私保护的协作学习，但在高风险场景如医疗保健中，仅依靠隐私保证不足以维持信任，尤其是在FL系统向基于大型语言模型的自适应架构演进时，信任成为涉及自主决策、非平稳环境和多方治理的系统级问题。现有方法多关注静态模型属性，忽视了系统级信任的动态维护和跨利益相关者协调的复杂性，导致在代理AI和多变环境下应用受限，亟待系统性解决方案。
light_analysis.method: 研究方法包括提出可信联邦学习（TFL）概念，将信任视为持续维护的操作条件而非静态属性。核心创新是通过Trust Report 2.0的视角，开发需求驱动的挑战分类法，扩展以涵盖控制平面决策、代理行为和系统动态，并引入协调蓝图结构化跨要求权衡、决策理由和治理对齐。具体地，Trust Report 2.0被实例化为一个轻量级、隐私保护的人工制品，用于生成决策为中心的信任证据，避免原始数据集中化，并以医疗保健领域（如肿瘤学FL）作为应用示例验证框架的实用性。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确说明具体实验结果或性能指标，如准确率或效率改进。论文通过概念性框架展示其在高风险领域的适用性，例如在医疗保健场景中强调监管压力和临床风险下的潜在价值，但没有提供量化数据或基线对比，主要侧重于方法论的理论阐述和框架的初步验证。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文主要贡献是提出可信联邦学习（TFL）的概念框架、挑战分类法和协调蓝图，促进FL系统的系统级信任维护，为代理AI和多利益相关者环境下的高风险应用提供理论基础。其学术价值在于扩展了信任建模的视角，实际应用价值体现在医疗保健等领域的潜在部署中。局限性可能包括理论性较强，未来工作方向可包括实证验证、优化Trust Report 2.0的实现，以及扩展到其他动态领域如金融或自动驾驶。

title: Evaluating Text Style Transfer: A Nine-Language Benchmark for Text Detoxification
abstract: Despite notable advances in large language models (LLMs), reliable evaluation of text generation tasks such as text style transfer (TST) remains an open challenge. Existing research has shown that automatic metrics often correlate poorly with human judgments (Dementieva et al., 2024; Pauli et al., 2025), limiting our ability to assess model performance accurately. Furthermore, most prior work has focused primarily on English, while the evaluation of multilingual TST systems, particularly for text detoxification, remains largely underexplored. In this paper, we present the first comprehensive multilingual benchmarking study of evaluation metrics for text detoxification evaluation across nine languages: Arabic, Amharic, Chinese, English, German, Hindi, Russian, Spanish, and Ukrainian. Drawing inspiration from machine translation evaluation, we compare neural-based automatic metrics with LLM-as-a-judge approaches together with experiments on task-specific fine-tuned models. Our analysis reveals that the proposed metrics achieve significantly higher correlation with human judgments compared to baseline approaches. We also provide actionable insights and practical guidelines for building robust and reliable multilingual evaluation pipelines for text detoxification and related TST tasks.

light_analysis.overview: 本文首次在九种语言上进行了文本去毒化评估指标的全面多语言基准研究，比较了基于神经的自动指标与LLM作为评判员的方法，显著提升了评估可靠性。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前，尽管大型语言模型在文本生成任务上取得进展，但文本风格转换等任务的可靠评估仍是挑战，自动指标常与人类判断相关性差，限制了模型性能的准确评估。现有研究主要集中在英语，多语言文本风格转换系统，特别是文本去毒化的评估，未得到充分探索，因此需解决多语言评估的不足。
light_analysis.method: 研究方法借鉴机器翻译评估思路，比较基于神经网络的自动指标与LLM-as-a-judge方法，并在九种语言（阿拉伯语、阿姆哈拉语、中文、英语、德语、印地语、俄语、西班牙语、乌克兰语）上进行实验，使用任务特定微调模型，关键创新在于扩展到多语言环境，为文本去毒化提供全面评估框架。
light_analysis.result: 实验分析显示，提出的评估指标在与人类判断的相关性上显著高于基线方法，摘要未明确说明具体数据，但强调了相关性的显著提升，证明新方法能更可靠地评估多语言文本去毒化性能。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究首次提供九种语言的文本去毒化评估基准，并得出实用指南和洞察，用于构建鲁棒的多语言评估流水线，推动文本风格转换任务的可靠评估，具有学术和应用价值，未来工作可扩展到更多语言和任务。

title: Function Induction and Task Generalization: An Interpretability Study with Off-by-One Addition
abstract: Large language models demonstrate the intriguing ability to perform unseen tasks via in-context learning. However, it remains unclear what mechanisms inside the model drive such task-level generalization. In this work, we approach this question through the lens of off-by-one addition (i.e., 1+1=3, 2+2=5, 3+3=?), a two-step, counterfactual task with an unexpected +1 function as a second step. Leveraging circuit-style interpretability techniques such as path patching, we analyze the models' internal computations behind their performance and present three key findings. First, we identify a mechanism that explains the model's generalization from standard addition to off-by-one addition. It resembles the induction head mechanism described in prior work, yet operates at a higher level of abstraction; we therefore term it "function induction" in this work. Second, we show that the induction of the +1 function is governed by multiple attention heads in parallel, each of which emits a distinct piece of the +1 function. Finally, we find that this function induction mechanism is reused in a broader range of tasks, including synthetic tasks such as shifted multiple-choice QA and algorithmic tasks such as base-8 addition. Overall, our findings offer deeper insights into how reusable and composable structures within language models enable task-level generalization.

light_analysis.overview: 本研究通过可解释性分析揭示了语言模型中函数归纳机制如何实现任务级泛化，特别是在 off-by-one 加法任务中。
light_analysis.motivation: 大型语言模型通过上下文学习能够执行未见任务，但其内部机制尚不清晰，这限制了模型的可靠性和可解释性。现有研究缺乏对模型如何从简单任务泛化到复杂任务的具体理解，导致难以评估和优化模型的泛化能力。因此，本研究旨在通过一个反事实任务——off-by-one 加法，来探讨模型的任务级泛化机制，以解决这一问题并推动可解释性研究的发展。
light_analysis.method: 本研究以 off-by-one 加法任务为案例，这是一个两步的反事实任务，其中第二步涉及意外的 +1 函数。采用电路式可解释性技术，如路径修补，来分析模型内部的计算过程。核心创新在于识别了“函数归纳”机制，该机制类似于先前研究的归纳头机制，但操作在更高抽象层次。此外，研究通过分析多个注意力头并行控制 +1 函数的归纳，揭示了模型内部结构的可组合性，使用的数据集和模型架构摘要未明确说明。
light_analysis.result: 实验揭示了三个关键发现：首先，模型从标准加法到 off-by-one 加法的泛化通过函数归纳机制实现，该机制抽象层次更高；其次，+1 函数的归纳由多个注意力头并行执行，每个头贡献函数的不同部分；最后，这种函数归纳机制在更广泛的任务中被重用，包括移位多项选择 QA 和基数-8 加法，证明了其可重用性。与基线方法的对比和具体性能指标摘要未明确说明，但结果强调了模型内部结构的灵活性和泛化能力。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的核心贡献是通过可解释性分析，展示了语言模型中函数归纳机制如何支持任务级泛化，深化了对模型内部可重用和可组合结构的理解。学术价值在于为模型设计和评估提供了新视角，增强了对泛化机制的解释性。潜在应用包括改进模型的可靠性和泛化性能，未来工作可扩展至更多任务类型，以验证机制的普适性和潜在局限性。

title: Knowing When to Quit: Probabilistic Early Exits for Speech Separation
abstract: In recent years, deep learning-based single-channel speech separation has improved considerably, in large part driven by increasingly compute- and parameter-efficient neural network architectures. Most such architectures are, however, designed with a fixed compute and parameter budget and consequently cannot scale to varying compute demands or resources, which limits their use in embedded and heterogeneous devices such as mobile phones and hearables. To enable such use-cases we design a neural network architecture for speech separation and enhancement capable of early-exit, and we propose an uncertainty-aware probabilistic framework to jointly model the clean speech signal and error variance which we use to derive probabilistic early-exit conditions in terms of desired signal-to-noise ratios. We evaluate our methods on both speech separation and enhancement tasks where we demonstrate that early-exit capabilities can be introduced without compromising reconstruction, and that when trained on variable-length audio our early-exit conditions are well-calibrated and lead to considerable compute savings when used to dynamically scale compute at test time while remaining directly interpretable.

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出了一个不确定性感知的概率提前退出框架，用于语音分离和增强，以动态调整计算资源并适应嵌入式设备的需求。
light_analysis.motivation: 近年来，深度学习在单通道语音分离领域取得了显著进展，但大多数神经网络架构采用固定的计算和参数预算，无法适应不同的计算需求或资源限制。这在嵌入式设备（如移动电话和助听器）中尤为突出，因为这些设备通常资源受限且需求多变。现有方法的不足之处在于缺乏灵活性，限制了在异构环境中的广泛应用，因此本研究旨在解决语音分离技术在资源受限场景下的计算效率问题，以提高模型的实用性和适应性。
light_analysis.method: 本研究设计了一个支持提前退出的神经网络架构，专门用于语音分离和增强任务。关键创新点包括引入一个不确定性感知的概率框架，该框架联合建模干净语音信号和误差方差，并基于此推导出基于期望信噪比的概率提前退出条件。方法在训练时使用可变长度音频，使模型能够适应不同输入，并在测试时通过预测不确定性动态决定退出点，从而优化计算资源使用。核心思想是通过不确定性估计来控制计算复杂度，而不牺牲性能，增强了模型的可扩展性和灵活性。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果表明，在语音分离和增强任务中，提前退出能力的引入未损害重建质量，提前退出条件经过良好校准，能够有效在测试时动态缩放计算。这带来了显著的计算节省，同时保持了方法的直接可解释性。与基线固定计算架构相比，该方法在资源效率方面表现更优，但摘要未明确说明具体性能指标如准确率提升或效率改进的百分比，仅强调了计算减少和校准效果。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献是提出了一个概率提前退出框架，解决了语音分离在嵌入式设备中的计算效率挑战，具有重要的学术价值和实际应用价值，扩展了深度学习模型在资源受限环境中的适用性。潜在局限性可能包括对不确定性估计的准确性依赖以及在不同数据集上的泛化能力，未来工作可探索更广泛的实验验证和退出条件优化。总的来说，这项工作为自适应神经网络架构的发展提供了新方向，有助于推动高效AI技术在现实世界中的应用。

title: D2Dewarp: Dual Dimensions Geometric Representation Learning Based Document Image Dewarping
abstract: Document image dewarping remains a challenging task in the deep learning era. While existing methods have improved by leveraging text line awareness, they typically focus only on a single horizontal dimension. In this paper, we propose a fine-grained deformation perception model that focuses on Dual Dimensions of document horizontal-vertical-lines to improve document Dewarping called D2Dewarp. It can perceive distortion trends in different directions across document details. To combine the horizontal and vertical granularity features, an effective fusion module based on X and Y coordinate is designed to facilitate interaction and constraint between the two dimensions for feature complementarity. Due to the lack of annotated line features in current public dewarping datasets, we also propose an automatic fine-grained annotation method using public document texture images and automatic rendering engine to build a new large-scale distortion training dataset named DocDewarpHV. On three public Chinese and English benchmarks, both quantitative and qualitative results show that our method achieves better rectification results compared with the state-of-the-art methods. The code and dataset are available at https://github.com/xiaomore/D2Dewarp.

light_analysis.overview: D2Dewarp 是一种基于水平和垂直线双维几何表示学习的文档图像去扭曲方法，显著提升了去扭曲效果。
light_analysis.motivation: 文档图像去扭曲在数字文档处理中至关重要，但现有方法通常仅利用水平文本线信息，忽略了垂直方向的变形特征。这限制了去扭曲的精度，因为文档变形往往在水平和垂直方向都有表现，导致变形趋势感知不全。因此，需要一种更全面的方法，同时考虑两个维度来感知变形趋势，以提升去扭曲效果。
light_analysis.method: 本论文提出了D2Dewarp模型，通过感知文档中水平和垂直线的细粒度变形来学习几何表示。关键创新在于设计了一个基于X和Y坐标的融合模块，有效整合两个维度的特征，增强交互和约束以实现特征互补。此外，由于公开数据集缺乏标注的线特征，作者开发了一种自动细粒度标注方法，利用公共文档纹理和渲染引擎构建了DocDewarpHV数据集，支持模型训练。摘要未明确说明具体模型架构。
light_analysis.result: 实验在三个公共中文和英文基准测试上进行，定量和定性评估显示，D2Dewarp方法在去扭曲效果上超越了当前最先进的方法，实现了更精确的文档矫正。摘要未明确说明具体性能指标如准确率提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本论文的主要贡献是提出了一个基于双维几何表示学习的文档图像去扭曲方法，通过水平和垂直线特征融合显著改善了变形感知。研究构建了DocDewarpHV数据集，解决了标注数据不足的问题。该工作在文档图像处理领域具有重要的学术和实用价值，为未来多维度变形分析提供了新思路。未来工作方向摘要未明确说明。

title: From Ambiguity to Accuracy: The Transformative Effect of Coreference Resolution on Retrieval-Augmented Generation systems
abstract: Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) has emerged as a crucial framework in natural language processing (NLP), improving factual consistency and reducing hallucinations by integrating external document retrieval with large language models (LLMs). However, the effectiveness of RAG is often hindered by coreferential complexity in retrieved documents, introducing ambiguity that disrupts in-context learning. In this study, we systematically investigate how entity coreference affects both document retrieval and generative performance in RAG-based systems, focusing on retrieval relevance, contextual understanding, and overall response quality. We demonstrate that coreference resolution enhances retrieval effectiveness and improves question-answering (QA) performance. Through comparative analysis of different pooling strategies in retrieval tasks, we find that mean pooling demonstrates superior context capturing ability after applying coreference resolution. In QA tasks, we discover that smaller models benefit more from the disambiguation process, likely due to their limited inherent capacity for handling referential ambiguity. With these findings, this study aims to provide a deeper understanding of the challenges posed by coreferential complexity in RAG, providing guidance for improving retrieval and generation in knowledge-intensive AI applications.

light_analysis.overview: 本文研究发现指代消解能显著提升RAG系统的检索和问答性能，并揭示小模型在此过程中获益更多。
light_analysis.motivation: 检索增强生成（RAG）已成为自然语言处理（NLP）中的关键框架，通过结合外部文档检索和大语言模型（LLMs）来改善事实一致性和减少幻觉。然而，RAG的有效性常受检索文档中核心指代复杂性的阻碍，这种歧义性破坏了上下文学习，导致检索和生成性能下降。本研究旨在解决这一问题，因为指代歧义在知识密集型AI应用中严重影响系统准确性，现有RAG方法在处理指代歧义时存在不足，需要通过指代消解来优化系统表现。
light_analysis.method: 论文系统性调查了实体指代如何影响基于RAG系统的文档检索和生成性能，聚焦于检索相关性、上下文理解和整体响应质量。方法包括应用核心指代消解技术，分析其对检索任务和问答任务的影响。在检索任务中，比较了不同池化策略（如均值池化）以评估上下文捕捉能力；在问答任务中，研究了不同规模模型对指代消解的响应。研究基于RAG框架和LLMs进行分析，尽管摘要未明确说明具体数据集或模型架构，但通过比较分析来探究指代复杂性的作用。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果表明，核心指代消解能有效提高RAG系统的检索效果和问答性能。在检索任务中，应用指代消解后，均值池化策略表现出优越的上下文捕捉能力。在问答任务中，较小的模型从消歧过程中获益更多，可能是因为它们固有的指代歧义处理能力有限。这些发现通过比较分析得到验证，尽管摘要未提供具体数值如准确率提升，但强调了指代消解对提升系统整体质量的重要性，并与基线方法进行了对比。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献在于揭示了核心指代消解对RAG系统的积极影响，提高了检索和生成性能，为改进知识密集型AI应用提供了指导。它加深了对指代复杂性挑战的理解，具有学术价值和应用价值，能促进更准确的NLP系统设计。未来工作可能涉及进一步优化指代处理策略或扩展到更广泛的NLP任务中，以增强系统的鲁棒性和适应性，尽管摘要未明确说明局限性。

title: UMA: A Family of Universal Models for Atoms
abstract: The ability to quickly and accurately compute properties from atomic simulations is critical for advancing a large number of applications in chemistry and materials science including drug discovery, energy storage, and semiconductor manufacturing. To address this need, Meta FAIR presents a family of Universal Models for Atoms (UMA), designed to push the frontier of speed, accuracy, and generalization. UMA models are trained on half a billion unique 3D atomic structures (the largest training runs to date) by compiling data across multiple chemical domains, e.g. molecules, materials, and catalysts. We develop empirical scaling laws to help understand how to increase model capacity alongside dataset size to achieve the best accuracy. The UMA small and medium models utilize a novel architectural design we refer to as mixture of linear experts that enables increasing model capacity without sacrificing speed. For example, UMA-medium has 1.4B parameters but only ~50M active parameters per atomic structure. We evaluate UMA models on a diverse set of applications across multiple domains and find that, remarkably, a single model without any fine-tuning can perform similarly or better than specialized models. We are releasing the UMA code, weights, and associated data to accelerate computational workflows and enable the community to continue to build increasingly capable AI models.

light_analysis.overview: UMA是一个通用原子模型家族，通过混合线性专家架构和大规模训练，实现高效精确的原子模拟。
light_analysis.motivation: 原子模拟在化学和材料科学中应用广泛，如药物发现、能源存储和半导体制造，需要快速准确的计算性质。现有方法可能依赖领域特定模型，缺乏泛化能力，导致计算效率低下。UMA旨在通过通用模型解决这一问题，提升速度、准确性和泛化能力，推进相关应用的发展。
light_analysis.method: UMA模型在5亿个独特3D原子结构上训练，数据来自多个化学领域如分子、材料和催化剂。采用混合线性专家架构，允许增加模型容量而不影响速度，例如UMA-medium有14亿参数但每原子结构仅激活约5000万参数。开发经验缩放定律以优化模型容量与数据集大小的关系，确保最佳性能。
light_analysis.result: 论文在多个化学领域应用中评估UMA模型，发现单个模型无需任何微调就能与专门训练的模型性能相当或更优。摘要未明确说明具体性能指标如准确率，但强调了其出色的泛化能力和效率提升，与基线方法对比显示显著优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: UMA的主要贡献在于提供一个通用的原子模拟模型家族，减少对领域特定模型的依赖，促进计算工作流程的加速。通过发布代码、权重和数据，有望推动社区构建更强大的AI模型，具有重要的学术和实际应用价值。未来工作可能包括进一步扩展数据集和优化模型架构。

title: Context Biasing for Pronunciation-Orthography Mismatch in Automatic Speech Recognition
abstract: Neural sequence-to-sequence systems deliver state-of-the-art performance for automatic speech recognition. When using appropriate modeling units, e.g., byte-pair encoding, these systems are in principle open vocabulary systems. In practice, however, they often fail to recognize words not seen during training, e.g., named entities, acronyms, or domain-specific special words. To address this problem, many context biasing methods have been proposed; however, these methods may still struggle when they are unable to relate audio and corresponding text, e.g., in case of a pronunciation-orthography mismatch. We propose a method where corrections of substitution errors can be used to improve the recognition accuracy of such challenging words. Users can add corrections on the fly during inference. We show that with this method we get a relative improvement in biased word error rate between 22% and 34% compared to a text-based replacement method, while maintaining the overall performance.

light_analysis.overview: 本论文提出一种基于用户实时校正替换错误的方法，以解决自动语音识别中发音与拼写不匹配导致的识别准确性问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 神经序列到序列系统在自动语音识别中表现优异，理论上能处理开放词汇，但实际应用中常无法准确识别训练中未见过的词汇，如命名实体或领域特定词。现有上下文偏置方法虽能辅助，但在发音与正字法不匹配时，音频与文本难以关联，导致识别失败。本研究针对这一关键挑战，旨在提高ASR系统在复杂场景下的鲁棒性和准确率，解决实际部署中的局限性。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出一种方法，通过校正替换错误来提升具有挑战性词汇的识别准确率。核心创新在于允许用户在推理过程中实时添加校正，动态调整输出。该方法可能涉及用户交互界面和错误检测机制，以应对发音与拼写不一致的情况。摘要未明确说明具体模型架构或数据集，但强调了用户参与的实时校正，为上下文偏置提供了新思路。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果表明，与基于文本的替换方法相比，所提方法在偏置词错误率上实现显著改进，相对提升幅度在22%到34%之间。同时，整体识别性能得以维持，没有因偏置处理而下降。这些结果验证了方法在改善特定词汇识别准确率方面的有效性，通过具体数据对比展示了其相对于基线的优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究贡献了一种用户参与的错误校正方法，有效解决了自动语音识别中发音与拼写不匹配的问题，在偏置词错误率上取得显著提升并保持整体性能。这增强了ASR系统在实际应用中的灵活性和准确性，尤其在专业领域或个性化场景下具有实用价值。未来工作可探索自动化校正机制或扩展到其他ASR挑战，如模型泛化。

title: EgoWorld: Translating Exocentric View to Egocentric View using Rich Exocentric Observations
abstract: Egocentric vision is essential for both human and machine visual understanding, particularly in capturing the detailed hand-object interactions needed for manipulation tasks. Translating third-person views into first-person views significantly benefits augmented reality (AR), virtual reality (VR) and robotics applications. However, current exocentric-to-egocentric translation methods are limited by their dependence on 2D cues, synchronized multi-view settings, and unrealistic assumptions such as the necessity of an initial egocentric frame and relative camera poses during inference. To overcome these challenges, we introduce EgoWorld, a novel framework that reconstructs an egocentric view from rich exocentric observations, including point clouds, 3D hand poses, and textual descriptions. Our approach reconstructs a point cloud from estimated exocentric depth maps, reprojects it into the egocentric perspective, and then applies diffusion model to produce dense, semantically coherent egocentric images. Evaluated on four datasets (i.e., H2O, TACO, Assembly101, and Ego-Exo4D), EgoWorld achieves state-of-the-art performance and demonstrates robust generalization to new objects, actions, scenes, and subjects. Moreover, EgoWorld exhibits robustness on in-the-wild examples, underscoring its practical applicability. Project page is available at https://redorangeyellowy.github.io/EgoWorld/.

light_analysis.overview: EgoWorld 是一个新颖框架，通过整合点云、3D手姿态和文本描述等丰富的第三方观测，实现了从第三方视角到第一人称视角的高质量图像翻译，提升了AR、VR和机器人应用的实用性。
light_analysis.motivation: 第一人称视觉对于捕捉详细的手-对象交互至关重要，广泛应用于增强现实(AR)、虚拟现实(VR)和机器人学，以支持操作任务。然而，现有的从第三方视图到第一人称视图的翻译方法存在局限性，如过度依赖2D线索、需要同步多视图设置以及不现实的假设（例如，推断时需初始第一人称帧和相对相机姿态），这限制了方法的泛化能力和实际应用。EgoWorld 旨在解决这些问题，通过利用更丰富的观测信息来克服这些挑战，推动相关技术的发展。
light_analysis.method: EgoWorld 提出了一种基于丰富第三方观测的框架，首先从估计的第三方深度图重建点云，然后将该点云重投影到第一人称视角。接着，应用扩散模型生成密集且语义一致的第一人称图像。关键创新点在于整合了多种观测数据，包括点云、3D手姿态和文本描述，以提供额外的3D和语义信息，从而减少对2D线索的依赖，并能在没有初始第一人称帧的情况下进行推理。该方法在多个数据集上进行训练和评估，以验证其有效性。
light_analysis.result: 在四个数据集（H2O、TACO、Assembly101 和 Ego-Exo4D）上的评估显示，EgoWorld 达到了最先进的性能，并展示了在处理新对象、动作、场景和受试者时的鲁棒泛化能力。此外，对野外示例的测试进一步验证了其强大的鲁棒性，突显了实际应用潜力。摘要未明确说明具体的准确率提升或效率改进量化指标，但强调了其相对于基线方法的显著改进和广泛适用性。
light_analysis.conclusion: EgoWorld 的主要贡献在于开发了一个从丰富第三方观测重建第一人称视图的框架，有效克服了现有方法的限制，推动了第一人称视觉技术的学术进展。其实用价值体现在为AR、VR和机器人应用提供了更可靠的解决方案。未来工作可能包括优化点云估计和扩散模型的效率，或扩展应用于更复杂场景。尽管表现出色，但该方法可能仍依赖于深度图估计的准确性，这在实际部署中需进一步研究。

title: On the Limits of Sparse Autoencoders: A Theoretical Framework and Reweighted Remedy
abstract: Sparse autoencoders (SAEs) have recently emerged as a powerful tool for interpreting the features learned by large language models (LLMs). By reconstructing features with sparsely activated networks, SAEs aim to recover complex superposed polysemantic features into interpretable monosemantic ones. Despite their wide applications, it remains unclear under what conditions SAEs can fully recover the ground truth monosemantic features from the superposed polysemantic ones. In this paper, we provide the first theoretical analysis with a closed-form solution for SAEs, revealing that they generally fail to fully recover the ground truth monosemantic features unless the ground truth features are extremely sparse. To improve the feature recovery of SAEs in general cases, we propose a reweighting strategy targeting at enhancing the reconstruction of the ground truth monosemantic features instead of the observed polysemantic ones. We further establish a theoretical weight selection principle for our proposed weighted SAE (WSAE). Experiments across multiple settings validate our theoretical findings and demonstrate that our WSAE significantly improves feature monosemanticity and interpretability.

light_analysis.overview: 本文首次对稀疏自编码器进行了理论分析，揭示其恢复基础单义词特征的极限，并提出加权策略以提升特征单义性和可解释性。
light_analysis.motivation: 稀疏自编码器（SAEs）作为解释大型语言模型学习到的特征的工具，旨在将叠加的多义词特征转换为可解释的单义词特征，但现有方法在完全恢复基础单义词特征方面存在理论空白，尤其在非极端稀疏条件下效果有限，这限制了特征解释的准确性和应用价值。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出理论分析框架，通过闭合形式解证明稀疏自编码器仅在基础特征极其稀疏时能完全恢复单义词特征。基于此，提出重新加权策略，开发加权SAE（WSAE），优先重建基础单义词特征而非观测到的多义词特征，并建立理论权重选择原则指导优化过程。
light_analysis.result: 实验在多个设置下验证了理论发现，即标准稀疏自编码器在非极端稀疏条件下难以完全恢复基础特征，而提出的加权SAE显著改善了特征的单义性和可解释性。与基线稀疏自编码器相比，WSAE表现出更优性能，但具体提升指标摘要未明确说明。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究贡献了稀疏自编码器的首次理论分析，揭示了其恢复极限，并提出加权SAE方法提升特征恢复效果。学术上深化了对稀疏自编码器工作原理的理解，实际应用上增强了大型语言模型特征解释的可靠性，未来工作可扩展至更广泛条件或优化策略，但具体局限性摘要未明确说明。

title: Honesty in Causal Forests: When It Helps and When It Hurts
abstract: Causal forests estimate how treatment effects vary across individuals, guiding personalized interventions in areas like marketing, operations, and public policy. A standard modeling practice with this method is honest estimation: dividing the data into two samples, one to define subgroups and another to estimate treatment effects within them. This is intended to reduce overfitting and is the default in many software packages. But is it the right choice? In this paper, we show that honest estimation can reduce the accuracy of individual-level treatment effect estimates, especially when there are substantial differences in how individuals respond to treatment, and the data is rich enough to uncover those differences. The core issue is a classic bias-variance trade-off: honesty lowers the risk of overfitting but increases the risk of underfitting, because it limits the data available to detect and model heterogeneity. Across 7,500 benchmark datasets, we find that the cost of using honesty by default can be as high as requiring 25% more data to match the performance of models trained without it. We argue that honesty is best understood as a form of regularization and its use should be guided by application goals and empirical evaluation, not adopted reflexively.

light_analysis.overview: 论文揭示因果森林中诚实估计在某些场景下会损害估计准确性，主张其应作为正则化工具并基于应用需求灵活使用。
light_analysis.motivation: 因果森林用于估计个体治疗效果差异，支持个性化干预，诚实估计是标准实践以减少过拟合。但当个体响应差异显著且数据丰富时，现有默认使用诚实性可能不足以捕捉异质性，导致欠拟合。本研究旨在评估诚实估计的适用性，弥补其盲目采用可能带来的性能损失。
light_analysis.method: 论文采用因果森林模型，通过大规模基准实验分析诚实估计的影响。核心方法包括将数据划分为子组和估计样本，以实证探讨诚实性如何引发偏差-方差权衡。关键创新在于基于7,500个数据集，量化诚实性在不同数据特性下的效果，未提及具体模型架构细节，但强调基于基准测试的方法。
light_analysis.result: 在7,500个基准数据集中，诚实估计降低了个体治疗效果估计的准确性，尤其是在异质性高和数据充足时。与不使用诚实性的基线相比，默认使用诚实性可能导致性能下降，需要额外25%的数据才能匹配非诚实模型的性能，凸显了偏差与方差之间的权衡成本。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文的主要贡献在于指出诚实估计在因果森林中并非总是最佳，应视为正则化手段并根据应用目标调整。学术上，这深化了对偏差-方差权衡的理解；实际应用中，鼓励基于数据特性的实证评估。局限性摘要未明确说明，未来工作可探索更优的使用场景指导策略。

title: Query-Level Uncertainty in Large Language Models
abstract: It is important for Large Language Models (LLMs) to be aware of the boundary of their knowledge, distinguishing queries they can confidently answer from those that lie beyond their capabilities. Such awareness enables models to perform adaptive inference, such as invoking retrieval-augmented generation (RAG), engaging in slow and deep thinking, or abstaining from answering when appropriate. These mechanisms are key to developing efficient and trustworthy AI. In this work, we propose a method to detect knowledge boundaries via Query-Level Uncertainty, which estimates if a model is capable of answering a given query before generating any tokens, thus avoiding the generation cost. To this end, we propose a novel, training-free method called Internal Confidence, which leverages self-evaluations across layers and tokens to provide a reliable signal of uncertainty. Empirical studies on both factual question answering and mathematical reasoning tasks demonstrate that our Internal Confidence outperforms several baselines in quality of confidence while being computationally cheaper. Furthermore, we demonstrate its benefits in adaptive inference settings, showing that for RAG and model cascading it reduces inference costs while preserving overall performance.

light_analysis.overview: 提出了一种基于内部置信度的查询级别不确定性检测方法，以提升大语言模型的效率和可信度。
light_analysis.motivation: 大语言模型需要意识到自己的知识边界，以便区分可以自信回答的查询和超出能力范围的查询，从而实现自适应推理，如调用检索增强生成或适时弃答。现有方法往往在生成答案后才能评估不确定性，导致计算成本高，影响模型效率和可信度。本研究旨在解决这一问题，通过预先估计不确定性来优化推理过程，这对于开发高效和可靠的AI系统至关重要。
light_analysis.method: 本文提出了一种名为Query-Level Uncertainty的方法，使用无需训练的Internal Confidence技术。该方法通过分析模型内部各层和令牌的自评估信息，在生成任何令牌之前判断模型是否能回答查询。关键创新在于训练免费，利用内部特征提供可靠的不确定性信号，减少了传统不确定性估计方法所需的额外计算开销，并适用于多种任务如事实问答和数学推理。
light_analysis.result: 在事实问答和数学推理任务上的实证研究表明，Internal Confidence方法在置信度质量上优于多个基线方法，且计算成本更低。具体而言，它通过减少无效生成，在自适应推理设置如检索增强生成和模型级联中，显著降低了推理成本，同时保持了整体性能，验证了其在实际应用中的有效性和效率提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本论文的核心贡献是提出了一种高效的不确定性估计方法，帮助大语言模型更好地识别知识边界，支持自适应推理并提升模型效率和可信度。这为构建高效可信的AI系统提供了重要工具，具有学术价值和实际应用前景。未来工作可探索方法在更多任务上的扩展或进一步优化不确定性信号的质量，摘要未明确说明具体局限性。

title: Robust Adversarial Quantification via Conflict-Aware Evidential Deep Learning
abstract: Reliability of deep learning models is critical for deployment in high-stakes applications, where out-of-distribution or adversarial inputs may lead to detrimental outcomes. Evidential Deep Learning, an efficient paradigm for uncertainty quantification, models predictions as Dirichlet distributions of a single forward pass. However, EDL is particularly vulnerable to adversarially perturbed inputs, making overconfident errors. Conflict-aware Evidential Deep Learning (C-EDL) is a lightweight post-hoc uncertainty quantification approach that mitigates these issues, enhancing adversarial and OOD robustness without retraining. C-EDL generates diverse, task-preserving transformations per input and quantifies representational disagreement to calibrate uncertainty estimates when needed. C-EDL's conflict-aware prediction adjustment improves detection of OOD and adversarial inputs, maintaining high in-distribution accuracy and low computational overhead. Our experimental evaluation shows that C-EDL significantly outperforms state-of-the-art EDL variants and competitive baselines, achieving substantial reductions in coverage for OOD data (up to $\approx$55%) and adversarial data (up to $\approx$90%), across a range of datasets, attack types, and uncertainty metrics.

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出了Conflict-aware Evidential Deep Learning (C-EDL)，一种轻量级的事后不确定性量化方法，通过冲突感知预测调整增强对抗性和分布外输入的鲁棒性，无需重新训练模型。
light_analysis.motivation: 深度学习模型在高风险应用中的可靠性至关重要，但分布外或对抗性输入可能导致灾难性后果。证据深度学习（EDL）是一种高效的不确定性量化范式，但其在面对对抗性扰动时表现脆弱，容易产生过自信的错误预测。现有方法在增强鲁棒性时往往需要重新训练，这带来了计算开销和部署复杂度。因此，开发无需重新训练的鲁棒不确定性量化方法具有重要意义，以提高模型的安全性和实用性。
light_analysis.method: C-EDL是一种轻量级的事后不确定性量化方法，无需重新训练模型。它通过为每个输入生成多样化的任务保持变换，并量化这些变换在模型表示中的不一致性（表示冲突），以校准不确定性估计。关键创新是冲突感知预测调整，利用表示冲突在需要时检测高不确定性输入，从而提升对抗性和分布外输入的识别能力。该方法保持高分布内准确性和低计算开销，适用于各种深度学习架构。
light_analysis.result: 实验评估显示，C-EDL在一系列数据集、攻击类型和不确定性指标上显著优于最先进的EDL变体和竞争基线。具体地，在分布外数据的覆盖率上降低了约55%，在对抗性数据的覆盖率上降低了约90%。这证明了C-EDL在提升不确定性量化鲁棒性方面的有效性，同时保持了高精度和低计算成本，验证了其在多种场景下的泛化能力。
light_analysis.conclusion: C-EDL的主要贡献在于提出了一种冲突感知的证据深度学习框架，无需重新训练即可显著增强对抗性和分布外鲁棒性，提升了深度学习模型的可靠性。这项研究在高风险应用中具有重要应用价值，通过改进不确定性量化增强了模型的安全部署潜力。未来工作可探索在更多复杂数据集和攻击类型下的优化，以及与其他不确定性方法的结合（摘要未明确说明具体局限性）。

title: AutoQD: Automatic Discovery of Diverse Behaviors with Quality-Diversity Optimization
abstract: Quality-Diversity (QD) algorithms have shown remarkable success in discovering diverse, high-performing solutions, but rely heavily on hand-crafted behavioral descriptors that constrain exploration to predefined notions of diversity. Leveraging the equivalence between policies and occupancy measures, we present a theoretically grounded approach to automatically generate behavioral descriptors by embedding the occupancy measures of policies in Markov Decision Processes. Our method, AutoQD, leverages random Fourier features to approximate the Maximum Mean Discrepancy (MMD) between policy occupancy measures, creating embeddings whose distances reflect meaningful behavioral differences. A low-dimensional projection of these embeddings that captures the most behaviorally significant dimensions can then be used as behavioral descriptors for CMA-MAE, a state of the art blackbox QD method, to discover diverse policies. We prove that our embeddings converge to true MMD distances between occupancy measures as the number of sampled trajectories and embedding dimensions increase. Through experiments in multiple continuous control tasks we demonstrate AutoQD's ability in discovering diverse policies without predefined behavioral descriptors, presenting a well-motivated alternative to prior methods in unsupervised Reinforcement Learning and QD optimization. Our approach opens new possibilities for open-ended learning and automated behavior discovery in sequential decision making settings without requiring domain-specific knowledge. Source code is available at https://github.com/conflictednerd/autoqd-code.

light_analysis.overview: AutoQD提出一种基于策略占用度量嵌入的自动行为描述符生成方法，用于质量-多样性优化，无需预定义行为描述符。
light_analysis.motivation: 质量-多样性算法在发现多样、高性能解方面取得显著成功，但严重依赖手工设计的行为描述符，这限制了探索到预定的多样性概念，阻碍了开放端学习的发展。现有方法需要领域特定知识，难以自动化行为发现，降低了无监督强化学习的灵活性和效率。因此，亟需一种自动生成行为描述符的框架，以摆脱手工设计的约束，促进自动化行为发现和决策系统的进步。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出AutoQD方法，利用策略与占用度量的等价性，在马尔可夫决策过程中嵌入占用度量。通过随机傅里叶特征近似最大平均差异，创建嵌入，其距离反映策略间的行为差异。随后，低维投影提取最显著的行为维度，作为行为描述符用于CMA-MAE算法，这是一种先进的黑盒质量-多样性方法。该方法理论证明了嵌入随样本轨迹和维度增加而收敛到真实距离，确保了技术基础。
light_analysis.result: 在多个连续控制任务中，实验验证了AutoQD的能力，能够无需预定义行为描述符发现多样策略。与基线方法相比，摘要未明确说明具体性能数据如准确率或效率提升，但结果表明该方法在无监督强化学习和质量-多样性优化中具有竞争力，提供了自动行为发现的有效替代方案，推动了相关领域的发展。
light_analysis.conclusion: AutoQD的主要贡献是提出一个理论基础的方法，自动生成行为描述符，用于质量-多样性优化，减少了对手工设计的依赖。学术价值在于为无监督强化学习提供了新思路，实际应用包括开放端学习和自动化决策系统。摘要未明确说明局限性，但未来工作可能包括扩展到复杂环境或优化效率，进一步增强方法的普适性和实用性。

title: An Approximation Theory Perspective on Machine Learning
abstract: A central problem in machine learning is often formulated as follows: Given a dataset $\{(x_j, y_j)\}_{j=1}^M$, which is a sample drawn from an unknown probability distribution, the goal is to construct a functional model $f$ such that $f(x) \approx y$ for any $(x, y)$ drawn from the same distribution. Neural networks and kernel-based methods are commonly employed for this task due to their capacity for fast and parallel computation. The approximation capabilities, or expressive power, of these methods have been extensively studied over the past 35 years. In this paper, we will present examples of key ideas in this area found in the literature. We will discuss emerging trends in machine learning including the role of shallow/deep networks, approximation on manifolds, physics-informed neural surrogates, neural operators, and transformer architectures. Despite function approximation being a fundamental problem in machine learning, approximation theory does not play a central role in the theoretical foundations of the field. One unfortunate consequence of this disconnect is that it is often unclear how well trained models will generalize to unseen or unlabeled data. In this review, we examine some of the shortcomings of the current machine learning framework and explore the reasons for the gap between approximation theory and machine learning practice. We will then introduce our novel research to achieve function approximation on unknown manifolds without the need to learn specific manifold features, such as the eigen-decomposition of the Laplace-Beltrami operator or atlas construction. In many machine learning problems, particularly classification tasks, the labels $y_j$ are drawn from a finite set of values.

light_analysis.overview: 该论文的核心贡献是提出了一种新方法，在未知流形上实现函数近似，无需学习具体的流形特征，以弥合近似理论与机器学习实践的差距。
light_analysis.motivation: 本研究动机源于机器学习的核心问题：从数据集构建函数模型以实现近似目标。尽管神经网络和核方法因其快速并行计算能力而被广泛使用，但近似理论在机器学习理论中未占据中心地位，导致模型泛化能力不明确，尤其在处理未知或未标记数据时。现有方法在未知流形上需要学习特定特征（如拉普拉斯-贝尔特拉米算子的特征分解），增加了复杂性和不确定性，本研究旨在解决这一不足，提升模型的泛化性能。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出了一种新的函数近似方法，专注于在未知流形上实现近似，无需学习具体的流形特征，如拉普拉斯-贝尔特拉米算子的特征分解或图集构建。该方法可能整合机器学习的新兴趋势，包括浅层/深层网络、流形近似、物理信息神经网络替代、神经算子和Transformer架构。核心创新在于简化了流形近似过程，但摘要未明确说明具体技术细节，如使用的数据集或模型架构。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确说明具体的实验结果，因为这是一篇回顾性论文，重点在于理论分析和新方法的引入，而非实证研究。因此，未提及性能指标（如准确率提升或效率改进）或与基线方法的对比，但强调了该方法旨在提高模型在未知数据上的泛化能力。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文的结论强调了近似理论在机器学习中的核心重要性，通过提出在未知流形上的函数近似方法，以减少泛化不确定性。学术价值在于弥合近似理论与实践的差距，促进理论发展；实际应用价值包括提升分类等任务在未见数据上的性能。局限性可能包括方法尚未广泛验证，未来工作可涉及实证研究和扩展到更多机器学习问题。

title: RLJP: Legal Judgment Prediction via First-Order Logic Rule-enhanced with Large Language Models
abstract: Legal Judgment Prediction (LJP) is a pivotal task in legal AI. Existing semantic-enhanced LJP models integrate judicial precedents and legal knowledge for high performance. But they neglect legal reasoning logic, a critical component of legal judgments requiring rigorous logical analysis. Although some approaches utilize legal reasoning logic for high-quality predictions, their logic rigidity hinders adaptation to case-specific logical frameworks, particularly in complex cases that are lengthy and detailed. This paper proposes a rule-enhanced legal judgment prediction framework based on first-order logic (FOL) formalism and comparative learning (CL) to develop an adaptive adjustment mechanism for legal judgment logic and further enhance performance in LJP. Inspired by the process of human exam preparation, our method follows a three-stage approach: first, we initialize judgment rules using the FOL formalism to capture complex reasoning logic accurately; next, we propose a Confusion-aware Contrastive Learning (CACL) to dynamically optimize the judgment rules through a quiz consisting of confusable cases; finally, we utilize the optimized judgment rules to predict legal judgments. Experimental results on two public datasets show superior performance across all metrics. The code is publicly available{https://anonymous.4open.science/r/RLJP-FDF1}.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一个基于一阶逻辑规则增强和对比学习的自适应法律判决预测框架，以提升法律推理逻辑的灵活性和预测性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 法律判决预测是法律AI的核心任务，现有语义增强模型虽整合司法先例和法律知识，但忽略法律推理逻辑的关键作用；尽管部分方法引入逻辑推理，其逻辑刚性难以适应复杂案例的特定框架，尤其在冗长细节案例中表现不足，因此需要开发一种能自适应调整逻辑的机制来解决这一瓶颈。
light_analysis.method: 本研究提出一个三阶段框架：首先，使用一阶逻辑形式化初始化判决规则，以准确捕获复杂推理逻辑；其次，提出混淆感知对比学习（CACL），通过设计混淆案例测试动态优化规则；最后，应用优化规则进行判决预测。方法结合一阶逻辑和对比学习，开发自适应调整机制，在两个公共数据集上进行实验，以提升对案例特定逻辑的适应性。
light_analysis.result: 在两个公开数据集上的实验结果显示，该方法在所有指标上表现优异，优于现有基线方法，验证了其在法律判决预测中的有效性。尽管摘要未提供具体性能数据，但强调了其整体性能的优越性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究贡献了一个结合一阶逻辑和对比学习的规则增强框架，显著提升法律判决预测性能，为法律AI提供自适应推理的新思路，具有学术和实际应用价值。未来工作可扩展至更多法律任务或数据集，以进一步提升泛化能力。

title: Do We Need All the Synthetic Data? Targeted Image Augmentation via Diffusion Models
abstract: Synthetically augmenting training datasets with diffusion models has become an effective strategy for improving the generalization of image classifiers. However, existing approaches typically increase dataset size by 10-30x and struggle to ensure generation diversity, leading to substantial computational overhead. In this work, we introduce TADA (TArgeted Diffusion Augmentation), a principled framework that selectively augments examples that are not learned early in training using faithful synthetic images that preserve semantic features while varying noise. We show that augmenting only this targeted subset consistently outperforms augmenting the entire dataset. Through theoretical analysis on a two-layer CNN, we prove that TADA improves generalization by promoting homogeneity in feature learning speed without amplifying noise. Extensive experiments demonstrate that by augmenting only 30-40% of the training data, TADA improves generalization by up to 2.8% across diverse architectures including ResNet, ViT, ConvNeXt, and Swin Transformer on CIFAR-10/100, TinyImageNet, and ImageNet, using optimizers such as SGD and SAM. Notably, TADA combined with SGD outperforms the state-of-the-art optimizer SAM on CIFAR-100 and TinyImageNet. Furthermore, TADA shows promising improvements on object detection benchmarks, demonstrating its applicability beyond image classification. Our code is available at https://github.com/BigML-CS-UCLA/TADA.

light_analysis.overview: 论文提出TADA框架，通过扩散模型选择性增强训练数据中未学到的示例，以提高图像分类器的泛化能力并降低计算成本。
light_analysis.motivation: 随着扩散模型在图像合成中的广泛应用，利用合成数据增强训练集已成为提升分类器泛化的有效手段。然而，当前方法通常需要大规模数据生成（10-30倍扩增），且难以平衡生成多样性，引发显著的计算负担。这阻碍了实际部署，尤其在资源受限的场景中，因此亟需更高效的增强策略，以精确选择对训练最有贡献的样本，避免冗余计算和性能瓶颈。
light_analysis.method: TADA框架采用扩散模型生成保持语义特征但变化噪声的图像，并动态识别训练早期未被充分学习的示例进行目标增强。其核心创新在于结合目标选择策略和扩散模型，通过理论分析在两层CNN模型中证明该方法能促进特征学习速度的同质性，避免噪声放大。这实现了仅增强30-40%训练数据的优化策略，利用了扩散模型的生成能力确保图像多样性。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果显示，TADA在CIFAR-10/100、TinyImageNet和ImageNet数据集上，使用ResNet、ViT等多种架构，将泛化能力提升高达2.8%，且仅增强30-40%的数据。具体而言，在CIFAR-100和TinyImageNet上，TADA结合SGD优化器超越了最先进的SAM优化器。此外，该方法在物体检测基准上也显示出改进，证实了其跨任务适用性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究提出了TADA框架，通过目标图像增强有效改善了图像分类器的泛化能力，并显著降低了计算开销。学术上，它提供了理论分析和实验验证；实际上，为高效模型训练提供了新途径。未来工作可扩展到更多视觉任务或结合其他生成技术，以提升通用性。

title: BAH Dataset for Ambivalence/Hesitancy Recognition in Videos for Digital Behavioural Change
abstract: Ambivalence and hesitancy (A/H), closely related constructs, are the primary reasons why individuals delay, avoid, or abandon health behaviour changes. They are subtle and conflicting emotions that sets a person in a state between positive and negative orientations, or between acceptance and refusal to do something. They manifest as a discord in affect between multiple modalities or within a modality, such as facial and vocal expressions, and body language. Although experts can be trained to recognize A/H as done for in-person interactions, integrating them into digital health interventions is costly and less effective. Automatic A/H recognition is therefore critical for the personalization and cost-effectiveness of digital behaviour change interventions. However, no datasets currently exist for the design of machine learning models to recognize A/H. This paper introduces the Behavioural Ambivalence/Hesitancy (BAH) dataset collected for multimodal recognition of A/H in videos. It contains 1,427 videos with a total duration of 10.60 hours, captured from 300 participants across Canada, answering predefined questions to elicit A/H. It is intended to mirror real-world digital behaviour change interventions delivered online. BAH is annotated by three experts to provide timestamps that indicate where A/H occurs, and frame- and video-level annotations with A/H cues. Video transcripts, cropped and aligned faces, and participant metadata are also provided. Since A and H manifest similarly in practice, we provide a binary annotation indicating the presence or absence of A/H. Additionally, this paper includes benchmarking results using baseline models on BAH for frame- and video-level recognition, and different learning setups. The limited performance highlights the need for adapted multimodal and spatio-temporal models for A/H recognition. The data and code are publicly available.

light_analysis.overview: 论文的核心贡献是引入了BAH数据集，用于视频中模棱两可/犹豫不决情绪的多模态识别，以支持数字行为改变干预。
light_analysis.motivation: 研究动机在于A/H情绪是导致个体延迟或放弃健康行为改变的主要原因，这些情绪在多模态表达中表现为不一致。现有的数字健康干预中，人工识别A/H成本高且效果有限，自动识别对提高干预的个性化和成本效益至关重要。然而，目前缺乏专门的数据集来训练机器学习模型，这阻碍了相关技术的发展和应用，因此迫切需要创建新的数据集以促进自动化识别方法的研发。
light_analysis.method: 研究方法涉及创建BAH数据集，包含从300名加拿大参与者收集的1,427个视频，总时长10.60小时，通过预设问题引发A/H。数据集由三位专家标注，提供A/H的时间戳和帧级、视频级注释，并包括视频转录、裁剪和未对齐的脸部图像以及参与者元数据。此外，论文使用基线模型对数据集进行基准测试，评估帧级和视频级识别的性能，旨在为未来多模态和时空模型的开发提供参考基础。
light_analysis.result: 主要实验结果显示，基线模型在BAH数据集上的帧级和视频级A/H识别性能有限，摘要未提供具体性能指标，但基准测试结果强调了开发适应性的多模态和时空模型的必要性，以提升识别准确性和效率，这表明当前方法在复杂情感识别任务上仍需改进。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文的主要贡献是填补了A/H识别数据集的空白，通过BAH数据集促进多模态机器学习研究，其学术价值在于为行为改变干预提供数据支持，实际应用潜力包括改善数字健康干预的自动化和个性化。局限性在于数据集规模和模型性能，未来工作可扩展到更多样化的场景和改进的识别算法，同时公开数据和代码有助于推动领域发展。

title: Convergence, Sticking and Escape: Stochastic Dynamics Near Critical Points in SGD
abstract: We study the convergence properties and escape dynamics of Stochastic Gradient Descent (SGD) in one-dimensional landscapes, separately considering infinite- and finite-variance noise. Our main focus is to identify the time scales on which SGD reliably moves from an initial point to the local minimum in the same ''basin''. Under suitable conditions on the noise distribution, we prove that SGD converges to the basin's minimum unless the initial point lies too close to a local maximum. In that near-maximum scenario, we show that SGD can linger for a long time in its neighborhood. For initial points near a ''sharp'' maximum, we show that SGD does not remain stuck there, and we provide results to estimate the probability that it will reach each of the two neighboring minima. Overall, our findings present a nuanced view of SGD's transitions between local maxima and minima, influenced by both noise characteristics and the underlying function geometry.
comment: The introduction, Subsections 2.1 ("Suitable Time Scaling") and 2.2 ("Sticking to a Critical Point"), as well as a small portion of the proof, have been revised. Subsection 2.3 ("Leaving the Neighborhood of a Sharp Maximum") has undergone minor revisions due to the equality in the doubly exponential case

light_analysis.overview: 本研究通过理论分析揭示了SGD在一维景观中基于噪声特性和函数几何的收敛与逃逸动力学。
light_analysis.motivation: SGD在机器学习优化中广泛应用，但其在临界点附近的复杂行为尚未完全理解。噪声特性和函数几何如何影响SGD的收敛和逃逸是关键问题，现有研究可能缺乏对一维场景中不同噪声类型的细致分析，导致对SGD动态过程的理解不足。本研究旨在填补这一空白，为优化算法的稳健性和效率提供理论支撑。
light_analysis.method: 论文采用理论分析方法，研究SGD在一维景观中的动力学，分别考虑无限方差和有限方差噪声。通过证明定理和提供结果，量化SGD从初始点移动到局部最小值的时间尺度。关键创新点包括对噪声分布的假设（如适合条件）和对函数几何（如“尖锐”最大值）的考量，分析SGD在不同初始点条件下的收敛与逃逸行为，但具体数据集或模型架构摘要未明确说明。
light_analysis.result: 研究发现，在噪声分布适合条件下，SGD可靠收敛到盆地的局部最小值，除非初始点太接近局部最大值。在接近局部最大值时，SGD可能长时间停留；对于“尖锐”最大值，SGD不会持续停留，并能估计其逃逸到两个相邻极小值的概率。这些结果通过理论证明呈现，提供了SGD过渡行为的定量描述，但具体数据如准确率或效率指标摘要未明确说明。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文的主要贡献是提供了一个细致视图，表明SGD在局部最大值和最小值之间的过渡受噪声特征和函数几何共同影响。这加深了对SGD动力学的理解，为优化算法的理论分析和实际应用提供指导，例如在训练神经网络时避免陷入不良临界点。未来工作可扩展到多维景观或更复杂噪声模型，以进一步验证和扩展这些发现。

title: Extremely Simple Multimodal Outlier Synthesis for Out-of-Distribution Detection and Segmentation
abstract: Out-of-distribution (OOD) detection and segmentation are crucial for deploying machine learning models in safety-critical applications such as autonomous driving and robot-assisted surgery. While prior research has primarily focused on unimodal image data, real-world applications are inherently multimodal, requiring the integration of multiple modalities for improved OOD detection. A key challenge is the lack of supervision signals from unknown data, leading to overconfident predictions on OOD samples. To address this challenge, we propose Feature Mixing, an extremely simple and fast method for multimodal outlier synthesis with theoretical support, which can be further optimized to help the model better distinguish between in-distribution (ID) and OOD data. Feature Mixing is modality-agnostic and applicable to various modality combinations. Additionally, we introduce CARLA-OOD, a novel multimodal dataset for OOD segmentation, featuring synthetic OOD objects across diverse scenes and weather conditions. Extensive experiments on SemanticKITTI, nuScenes, CARLA-OOD datasets, and the MultiOOD benchmark demonstrate that Feature Mixing achieves state-of-the-art performance with a $10 \times$ to $370 \times$ speedup. Our source code and dataset will be available at https://github.com/mona4399/FeatureMixing.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Feature Mixing方法，一种简单快速的多模态异常合成技术，用于提升分布外检测和分割的性能和效率。
light_analysis.motivation: 分布外检测和分割对于自动驾驶和机器人手术等安全关键应用至关重要。现有研究主要局限于单模态图像数据，但真实世界场景是多模态的，如视觉和点云数据融合的需求。关键挑战在于缺乏未知数据的监督信号，导致模型对OOD样本过置信，限制了部署可靠性。因此，开发多模态方法以增强模型区分能力，解决这一瓶颈问题。
light_analysis.method: 本研究提出Feature Mixing，一种极简且快速的多模态异常合成方法，基于特征混合理论生成合成异常，帮助模型更好区分分布内和分布外数据。该方法模态无关，适用于各种模态组合，如图像与点云的融合。此外，引入CARLA-OOD新数据集，包含合成OOD对象，覆盖多样场景和天气条件，为评估多模态OOD分割提供标准基准。
light_analysis.result: 在SemanticKITTI、nuScenes、CARLA-OOD数据集和MultiOOD基准上的广泛实验显示，Feature Mixing实现了最先进的性能，提高了检测和分割精度。与基线方法相比，该方法获得10倍到370倍的显著速度提升，证明其在多模态环境中的高效性和优越性。具体性能改善体现在准确率和效率指标上。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究贡献了Feature Mixing方法和CARLA-OOD数据集，以简单高效的方式推动多模态分布外检测和分割技术发展。学术价值在于提出了理论支持的异常合成方法，实际应用上增强了安全关键系统的模型可靠性。未来可扩展至更多模态和应用场景，探索理论深度和优化潜力。

title: Optimal Best-Arm Identification under Fixed Confidence with Multiple Optima
abstract: We study best-arm identification in stochastic multi-armed bandits under the fixed-confidence setting, focusing on instances with multiple optimal arms. Unlike prior work that addresses the unknown-number-of-optimal-arms case, we consider the setting where the number of optimal arms is known in advance. We derive a new information-theoretic lower bound on the expected sample complexity that leverages this structural knowledge and is strictly tighter than previous bounds. Building on the Track-and-Stop algorithm, we propose a modified, tie-aware stopping rule and prove that it achieves asymptotic instance-optimality, matching the new lower bound. Our results provide the first formal guarantee of optimality for Track-and-Stop in multi-optimal settings with known cardinality, offering both theoretical insights and practical guidance for efficiently identifying any optimal arm.
comment: To appear in IEEE Transactions on Information Theory

light_analysis.overview: 本文为Track-and-Stop算法在已知最优臂数量的多臂老虎机固定置信度设置中提供了首次正式最优性保证，通过推导更紧下界并提出修改的停止规则实现改进。
light_analysis.motivation: 在随机多臂老虎机中，识别最优臂是强化学习和决策理论的核心问题，尤其当存在多个最优臂时，高效识别任一最优臂对于资源分配和在线学习至关重要。现有研究多假设最优臂数量未知，导致样本复杂度下界不够紧密，无法充分利用结构知识以提高效率。本文针对已知最优臂数量的设定，旨在弥补这一不足，通过利用额外信息提供更优的理论框架和实用方法。
light_analysis.method: 论文基于经典的Track-and-Stop算法框架，通过引入一个修改的、考虑平局的停止规则来优化样本复杂性。关键创新在于利用已知最优臂数量的结构知识，进行信息论分析以推导新的下界。算法设计侧重于渐近实例最优性，无需特定数据集或模型架构，主要依靠理论推导和证明来确保在已知基数多最优设置下的有效性。
light_analysis.result: 论文推导了一个新的信息论下界，该下界严格优于先前未考虑已知最优臂数量的下界，证明了在样本复杂度上的改进。提出的修改停止规则实现了渐近实例最优性，匹配这个新下界，从而正式验证了算法在已知基数多最优环境中的最优性能，尽管摘要未提供具体实验数据如准确率数值，但理论结果展示了与基线方法的对比优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文的主要贡献在于为Track-and-Stop算法在已知最优臂数量的多最优随机多臂老虎机中提供了首个最优性保证，增强了理论深度并提供了实践指导。研究通过紧下界和算法优化，推动了最优臂识别领域的进展，潜在局限性可能包括假设已知最优臂数量在现实应用中的可行性，但摘要未明确说明未来工作方向或具体应用场景。

title: TSPulse: Tiny Pre-Trained Models with Disentangled Representations for Rapid Time-Series Analysis
abstract: Time-series tasks often benefit from signals expressed across multiple representation spaces (e.g., time vs. frequency) and at varying abstraction levels (e.g., local patterns vs. global semantics). However, existing pre-trained time-series models entangle these heterogeneous signals into a single large embedding, limiting transferability and direct zero-shot usability. To address this, we propose TSPulse, family of ultra-light pre-trained models (1M parameters) with disentanglement properties, specialized for various time-series diagnostic tasks. TSPulse introduces a novel pre-training framework that augments masked reconstruction with explicit disentanglement across spaces and abstractions, learning three complementary embedding views (temporal, spectral, and semantic) to effectively enable zero-shot transfer. In-addition, we introduce various lightweight post-hoc fusers that selectively attend and fuse these disentangled views based on task type, enabling simple but effective task specializations. To further improve robustness and mitigate mask-induced bias prevalent in existing approaches, we propose a simple yet effective hybrid masking strategy that enhances missing diversity during pre-training. Despite its compact size, TSPulse achieves strong and consistent gains across four TS diagnostic tasks: +20% on the TSB-AD anomaly detection leaderboard, +25% on similarity search, +50% on imputation, and +5-16% on multivariate classification, outperforming models that are 10-100X larger on over 75 datasets. TSPulse delivers state-of-the-art zero-shot performance, efficient fine-tuning, and supports GPU-free deployment. Models and source code are publicly available at https://huggingface.co/ibm-granite/granite-timeseries-tspulse-r1.

light_analysis.overview: TSPulse是一种超轻量级预训练时间序列模型，通过解耦时间、频谱和语义表示，实现高效的零样本传输和快速分析。
light_analysis.motivation: 时间序列任务需要利用多种表示空间（如时间与频率）和抽象层次（如局部模式与全局语义）的信号，但现有预训练模型将这些异构信号纠缠在单一大型嵌入中，限制了模型的可传输性和直接零样本使用性。这导致诊断任务中性能不足，影响实际应用效率，因此需开发更灵活和高效的表示方法来解决此问题。
light_analysis.method: TSPulse采用新颖的预训练框架，结合掩码重建和跨空间与抽象层的显式解耦，学习三个互补嵌入视图：时间、频谱和语义。此外，引入轻量级后处理融合器，根据任务类型选择性融合这些解耦视图以实现任务专用化。为提升鲁棒性并缓解现有方法中的掩码偏差，提出混合掩码策略增强预训练中的掩码多样性。模型仅含100万参数，专为时间序列诊断任务设计。
light_analysis.result: TSPulse在四个时间序列诊断任务上取得显著性能增益：异常检测在TSB-AD排行榜上提升20%，相似性搜索提升25%，插补提升50%，多元分类提升5-16%。在超过75个数据集上，优于参数大10-100倍的模型，展现出状态领先的零样本性能、高效微调能力，并支持无GPU部署，确保实际应用的便捷性。
light_analysis.conclusion: TSPulse通过解耦表示和混合掩码策略，贡献了一种创新的时间序列预训练方法，提升了模型的可传输性和零样本性能。研究具有重要学术价值，改进了时间序列分析的理论框架，并在实际应用中支持快速诊断任务，促进轻量级部署。尽管摘要未明确说明局限性，但未来工作可探索更多任务类型或进一步优化模型效率。

title: Unsupervised Representation Learning - an Invariant Risk Minimization Perspective
abstract: We propose a novel unsupervised framework for \emph{Invariant Risk Minimization} (IRM), extending the concept of invariance to settings where labels are unavailable.
