Traditional IRM methods rely on labeled data to learn representations that are robust to distributional shifts across environments. In contrast, our approach redefines invariance through feature distribution alignment, enabling robust representation learning from unlabeled data. We introduce two methods within this framework: Principal Invariant Component Analysis (PICA), a linear method that extracts invariant directions under Gaussian assumptions, and Variational Invariant Autoencoder (VIAE), a deep generative model that separates environment-invariant and environment-dependent latent factors. Our approach is based on a novel ``unsupervised'' structural causal model and supports environment-conditioned sample-generation and intervention. Empirical evaluations on synthetic dataset, modified versions of MNIST, and CelebA demonstrate the effectiveness of our methods in capturing invariant structure, preserving relevant information, and generalizing across environments without access to labels.

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出了一种无监督不变风险最小化框架，通过特征分布对齐扩展不变性概念到无标签设置，实现鲁棒表征学习。
light_analysis.motivation: 传统不变风险最小化（IRM）方法依赖标签数据来学习对分布变化鲁棒的表征，但在现实应用中，标签数据往往稀缺或成本高昂，限制了其适用性。现有方法在无标签设置下难以有效处理环境变化，这阻碍了学习泛化能力强的表征。因此，本研究旨在解决无标签数据中的不变表征学习问题，提出一种无需标签即可处理分布偏移的新框架，扩展了IRM的应用范围，提升无监督学习的鲁棒性。
light_analysis.method: 本研究提出一个无监督框架，重新定义不变性为特征分布对齐，从而实现从无标签数据中学习鲁棒表征。框架内包含两个创新方法：Principal Invariant Component Analysis (PICA)，一个线性方法，基于高斯假设提取不变方向；和Variational Invariant Autoencoder (VIAE)，一个深度生成模型，分离环境不变和环境依赖的潜在因子。方法基于新颖的“无监督”结构因果模型，支持环境条件样本生成和干预，通过优化特征分布以捕捉不变结构，无需依赖标签信息。
light_analysis.result: 实验在合成数据集、修改版MNIST和CelebA上进行评估，结果表明方法在捕获不变结构、保留相关信息以及跨环境泛化方面有效，无需标签即可学习鲁棒表征。摘要未明确说明具体性能指标如准确率提升，但提及了实证展示有效性，暗示与基线方法相比具有竞争力；未来工作可能涉及更多数据集验证。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献是扩展了不变风险最小化到无监督领域，提出PICA和VIAE方法，通过特征分布对齐学习不变表征，无需标签即可处理分布变化。学术价值在于为无监督表示学习提供了新视角，实际应用价值包括无标签数据的鲁棒学习任务。局限性可能在于对高斯假设的依赖或数据集范围的限制，未来工作可探索更复杂的数据分布和应用场景，进一步提升泛化能力。

title: Why 1 + 1 < 1 in Visual Token Pruning: Beyond Naive Integration via Multi-Objective Balanced Covering
abstract: Existing visual token pruning methods target prompt alignment and visual preservation with static strategies, overlooking the varying relative importance of these objectives across tasks, which leads to inconsistent performance. To address this, we derive the first closed-form error bound for visual token pruning based on the Hausdorff distance, uniformly characterizing the contributions of both objectives. Moreover, leveraging $ε$-covering theory, we reveal an intrinsic trade-off between these objectives and quantify their optimal attainment levels under a fixed budget. To practically handle this trade-off, we propose Multi-Objective Balanced Covering (MoB), which reformulates visual token pruning as a bi-objective covering problem. In this framework, the attainment trade-off reduces to budget allocation via greedy radius trading. MoB offers a provable performance bound and linear scalability with respect to the number of input visual tokens, enabling adaptation to challenging pruning scenarios. Extensive experiments show that MoB preserves 96.4% of performance for LLaVA-1.5-7B using only 11.1% of the original visual tokens and accelerates LLaVA-Next-7B by 1.3-1.5$\times$ with negligible performance loss. Additionally, evaluations on Qwen2-VL and Video-LLaVA confirm that MoB integrates seamlessly into advanced MLLMs and diverse vision-language tasks.

light_analysis.overview: 论文提出了多目标平衡覆盖（MoB）方法，通过理论分析和双目标覆盖框架优化视觉令牌剪枝中的性能权衡，实现高效和自适应的剪枝。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有视觉令牌剪枝方法使用静态策略处理提示对齐和视觉保存，忽略了不同任务中这些目标的相对重要性变化，导致性能不一致，限制了多模态大语言模型（MLLMs）的效率和适应性。这一问题的重要性在于，静态策略无法适应多样化任务需求，造成模型效率低下和效果波动，因此需要一种能动态平衡多目标的方法来提升剪枝的鲁棒性和实际应用价值。
light_analysis.method: 本研究提出多目标平衡覆盖（MoB）方法，将视觉令牌剪枝重新表述为一个双目标覆盖问题。首先，基于Hausdorff距离推导了第一个封闭形式误差界限，统一表征提示对齐和视觉保存的贡献。其次，利用ε-覆盖理论揭示了目标间的内在权衡，并在固定预算下量化最优达成水平。关键创新包括通过贪婪半径交易进行预算分配，确保线性可扩展性和可证明的性能界限，适用于如LLaVA等模型架构的挑战性剪枝场景。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果表明，MoB在LLaVA-1.5-7B模型上仅使用11.1%的原始视觉令牌就保留了96.4%的性能；在LLaVA-Next-7B模型上，加速了1.3-1.5倍，性能损失可忽略。这些数据相较于摘要中提到的现有方法（未指定具体基线）展示了显著改进。此外，对Qwen2-VL和Video-LLaVA的评估证实，MoB能无缝集成到先进MLLMs和多样化的视觉语言任务中，验证了其广泛适用性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的核心贡献包括推导了视觉令牌剪枝的首个封闭形式误差界限，提出了MoB方法以解决多目标权衡问题。学术价值在于统一了理论分析与实践框架，为视觉令牌剪枝提供了新范式；实际应用价值在于提升了多模态大语言模型的效率和适应性，适用于复杂视觉语言任务。未来工作方向可能涉及扩展到更多模型和场景，但摘要未明确说明具体局限性。

title: Emotion-Gradient Metacognitive RSI (Part I): Theoretical Foundations and Single-Agent Architecture
abstract: We present the Emotion-Gradient Metacognitive Recursive Self-Improvement (EG-MRSI) framework, a novel architecture that integrates introspective metacognition, emotion-based intrinsic motivation, and recursive self-modification into a unified theoretical system. The framework is explicitly capable of overwriting its own learning algorithm under formally bounded risk. Building upon the Noise-to-Meaning RSI (N2M-RSI) foundation, EG-MRSI introduces a differentiable intrinsic reward function driven by confidence, error, novelty, and cumulative success. This signal regulates both a metacognitive mapping and a self-modification operator constrained by provable safety mechanisms. We formally define the initial agent configuration, emotion-gradient dynamics, and RSI trigger conditions, and derive a reinforcement-compatible optimization objective that guides the agent's development trajectory. Meaning Density and Meaning Conversion Efficiency are introduced as quantifiable metrics of semantic learning, closing the gap between internal structure and predictive informativeness. This Part I paper establishes the single-agent theoretical foundations of EG-MRSI. Future parts will extend this framework to include safety certificates and rollback protocols (Part II), collective intelligence mechanisms (Part III), and feasibility constraints including thermodynamic and computational limits (Part IV). Together, the EG-MRSI series provides a rigorous, extensible foundation for open-ended and safe AGI.
comment: Withdrawn due to a critical error discovered in the stability and convergence proofs (specifically Lemma 2, Theorem 12, and Proposition 10) in Section 3. The identified flaw invalidates the core theoretical guarantees regarding capability growth and system stability

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出了一个整合元认知、情感梯度内在动机和递归自我改进的理论框架，以构建安全且开放的通用人工智能系统。
light_analysis.motivation: 研究动机在于解决通用人工智能（AGI）开发中的关键挑战，即如何使系统能够自我改进、适应开放环境，同时确保风险可控。现有方法如传统递归自我改进系统可能在整合情感动机和元认知方面不足，导致缺乏内在驱动或安全性问题。EG-MRSI框架旨在弥补这一差距，通过形式化风险边界和情感梯度调节，为AGI提供一个更全面的理论基础，以促进安全、有效的智能系统发展。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出EG-MRSI框架，基于Noise-to-Meaning RSI基础，整合了内省元认知、情感驱动的内在动机和递归自我修改。关键创新包括可微的内在奖励函数，该函数由置信度、误差、新颖性和累积成功驱动；以及情感梯度动力学，用于调节元认知映射和受可证明安全机制约束的自我修改算子。论文正式定义了初始代理配置、情感梯度动态和RSI触发条件，并推导了强化学习兼容的优化目标，引入了Meaning Density和Meaning Conversion Efficiency作为语义学习的量化指标。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确说明具体实验结果。由于这是理论部分（Part I），论文主要贡献是建立了理论框架，未提供实验数据或性能指标。研究重点在于理论推导和基础构建，未来部分可能涉及实验验证和与基线方法的对比。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文的主要贡献是建立了EG-MRSI的单代理理论基础，提供了一个严谨且可扩展的框架，用于实现开放、安全的AGI。通过整合元认知、情感动机和递归自我改进，该框架在学术上填补了理论空白，实践上为AGI开发奠定了基础。局限性在于目前仅涉及理论部分，未来工作将扩展至安全证书、回滚协议、集体智能机制和可行性约束，以完善系统实现和应用场景。

title: Apple's Synthetic Defocus Noise Pattern: Characterization and Forensic Applications
abstract: iPhone portrait-mode images contain a distinctive pattern in out-of-focus regions simulating the bokeh effect, which we term Apple's Synthetic Defocus Noise Pattern (SDNP). If overlooked, this pattern can interfere with blind forensic analyses, especially PRNU-based camera source verification, as noted in earlier works. Since Apple's SDNP remains underexplored, we provide a detailed characterization, proposing a method for its precise estimation, modeling its dependence on scene brightness, ISO settings, and other factors. Leveraging this characterization, we explore forensic applications of the SDNP, including traceability of portrait-mode images across iPhone models and iOS versions in open-set scenarios, assessing its robustness under post-processing. Furthermore, we show that masking SDNP-affected regions in PRNU-based camera source verification significantly reduces false positives, overcoming a critical limitation in camera attribution, and improving state-of-the-art techniques.
comment: The last version of the paper is now published in IEEE Transactions on Information Forensics & Security, vol. 21, pp. 1096-1111, 2026

light_analysis.overview: 论文提出了Apple合成失焦噪声模式（SDNP）的详细特征描述方法及其在图像取证中的应用，改进了基于PRNU的相机源验证技术。
light_analysis.motivation: 本研究旨在解决iPhone人像模式中合成失焦噪声模式（SDNP）对盲取证分析的干扰问题，特别是基于PRNU的相机源验证。现有方法常忽略此模式，导致在相机归属分析中产生误报，限制了取证准确性。由于SDNP先前未被充分研究，其特性和潜在影响尚未明确，因此需要深入探索以避免干扰并开发新的取证应用，以提升图像分析和犯罪调查的可靠性。
light_analysis.method: 论文首先对SDNP进行详细特征描述，提出一种精确估计方法，建模其对场景亮度、ISO设置等因素的依赖性。通过分析iPhone肖像模式图像，实验提取SDNP模式，探索其在开放集场景中的取证应用，包括跨iPhone模型和iOS版本的图像可追溯性。摘要未明确说明具体数据集或模型架构，但强调了基于PRNU技术进行后处理鲁棒性评估。
light_analysis.result: 研究结果表明，SDNP的精确估计使得在开放集场景中能有效追溯肖像模式图像到特定iPhone模型和iOS版本。摘要未明确说明具体性能指标，但指出在基于PRNU的相机源验证中，掩盖SDNP影响区域能显著减少误报，克服了现有技术的关键限制。实验还评估了SDNP在后处理下的鲁棒性，证明其在不同条件下具有稳定性，从而改进最先进取证技术。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文的主要贡献在于对Apple SDNP的全面特征描述及其在取证中的创新应用，提高了图像取证分析的准确性，特别是在相机源验证中减少误报。这不仅具有学术价值，推动盲取证技术的发展，还为实际犯罪调查和图像溯源提供了实用工具。潜在局限性可能包括对其他设备品牌的适用性；未来工作可扩展到更广泛设备或复杂场景的验证。

title: Healthy LLMs? Benchmarking LLM Knowledge of UK Government Public Health Information
abstract: As Large Language Models (LLMs) become widely accessible, a detailed understanding of their knowledge within specific domains becomes necessary for successful real world use. This is particularly critical in the domains of medicine and public health, where failure to retrieve relevant, accurate, and current information could significantly impact UK residents. However, while there are a number of LLM benchmarks in the medical domain, currently little is known about LLM knowledge within the field of public health. To address this issue, this paper introduces a new benchmark, PubHealthBench, with over 8000 questions for evaluating LLMs' Multiple Choice Question Answering (MCQA) and free form responses to public health queries. To create PubHealthBench we extract free text from 687 current UK government guidance documents and implement an automated pipeline for generating MCQA samples. Assessing 24 LLMs on PubHealthBench we find the latest proprietary LLMs (GPT-4.5, GPT-4.1 and o1) have a high degree of knowledge, achieving >90% accuracy in the MCQA setup, and outperform humans with cursory search engine use. However, in the free form setup we see lower performance with no model scoring >75%. Therefore, while there are promising signs that state of the art (SOTA) LLMs are an increasingly accurate source of public health information, additional safeguards or tools may still be needed when providing free form responses.

light_analysis.overview: 本文引入了PubHealthBench基准，以评估大型语言模型在英国政府公共健康信息上的知识。
light_analysis.motivation: 随着大型语言模型（LLMs）的广泛应用，评估其在特定领域的知识对于实际应用至关重要。在医学和公共健康领域，准确、及时的信息检索直接影响英国居民的健康决策。当前，尽管存在多个医学领域的LLM基准测试，但公共健康领域的知识评估仍然缺乏。由于公共健康信息涉及预防、教育等多方面，知识不完整或错误可能带来严重后果。因此，本研究旨在填补这一空白，通过系统评估LLMs在公共健康信息上的知识，为可靠应用提供基础。
light_analysis.method: 论文引入PubHealthBench基准，包含超过8000个问题，用于评估LLMs的多选题回答和自由形式回答。基准构建基于687个当前英国政府公共健康指南文档，提取自由文本并通过自动管道生成多选题（MCQA）样本。该自动化过程包括文本处理、问题生成和答案选项设计，提高效率和可扩展性。评估覆盖24个LLMs，使用MCQA和自由形式两种设置，全面测量知识水平。关键创新在于自动生成MCQA，减少人工干预，确保基准的客观性。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果显示，在MCQA设置中，最新专有LLMs（如GPT-4.5、GPT-4.1和o1）准确率超过90%，表现出高知识水平，优于人类使用搜索引擎的基准。相比之下，在自由形式回答设置中，所有模型表现较低，没有模型准确率超过75%，表明LLMs在生成自由文本时知识检索和应用能力不足。这些结果突出了SOTA LLMs在结构化问题上的优势，但在非结构化回答中的局限性，需进一步改进知识整合和表达。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献是推出了PubHealthBench基准，首次全面评估LLMs在公共健康信息上的知识。研究发现，SOTA LLMs在结构化问题回答中准确率高，但在自由形式回答中表现不佳，暗示需要额外保障或工具以确保可靠性。学术上，该研究促进了LLM在特定领域知识评估的进展；实际上，为公共健康应用中LLMs的安全使用提供了指导。局限性包括基准基于单一来源文档，未来工作可扩展到多源数据和改进评估方法。

title: When Your Own Output Becomes Your Training Data: Noise-to-Meaning Loops and a Formal RSI Trigger
abstract: We present Noise-to-Meaning Recursive Self-Improvement (N2M-RSI), a minimal formal model showing that once an AI agent feeds its own outputs back as inputs and crosses an explicit information-integration threshold, its internal complexity will grow without bound under our assumptions. The framework unifies earlier ideas on self-prompting large language models, Gödelian self-reference, and AutoML, yet remains implementation-agnostic. The model furthermore scales naturally to interacting swarms of agents, hinting at super-linear effects once communication among instances is permitted. For safety reasons, we omit system-specific implementation details and release only a brief, model-agnostic toy prototype in Appendix C.
comment: Withdrawn due to a critical error discovered in the mathematical derivation and proof of Theorem 2 (Unbounded Growth) and related Lemma 2 (Compression gain lower bound). This flaw invalidates the paper's main conclusion that N2M-RSI guarantees unbounded growth, requiring a fundamental revision of the theoretical framework

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出了N2M-RSI形式模型，展示了AI代理通过输出反馈循环触发递归自我改进时内部复杂性无限增长的现象。
light_analysis.motivation: 该研究旨在解决AI系统中递归自我改进的触发问题。当AI代理将其输出作为输入反馈时，可能导致无限自我改进，这对AI安全和可控性构成关键挑战。现有方法如自提示大语言模型、哥德尔自引用和AutoML虽分散研究，但缺乏统一形式框架来阐明信息整合阈值的作用。本研究通过建立最小形式模型，填补这一空白，为理解RSI机制提供理论基础，强调避免潜在风险的重要性。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出Noise-to-Meaning Recursive Self-Improvement (N2M-RSI)模型，这是一个最小形式框架，核心基于AI代理输出反馈为输入的递归循环。关键创新在于定义了一个明确的信息整合阈值，一旦超过，内部复杂性将无界增长。模型实施无关，不依赖具体系统细节，统一了自提示LLM、哥德尔自引用和AutoML等概念。它自然地扩展到多代理交互群体，提示允许通信时可能产生超线性效应，但出于安全考虑省略具体实现，仅在附录提供玩具原型。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确说明具体实验数据，但理论结果表明在N2M-RSI模型中，一旦AI代理的输出反馈循环超过信息整合阈值，其内部复杂性将无界增长。模型在附录C中发布了模型无关的玩具原型，但未提供性能指标或详细对比。框架统一了早期概念，如自提示和自引用，并暗示在多代理交互中可能实现超线性效应，为未来实证研究奠定基础，缺乏与传统基线的量化比较。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献是N2M-RSI形式模型，它阐明了AI递归自我改进的触发条件和内部复杂性增长机制。学术上，模型整合了多个领域的思想，为理论AI安全和可控性提供新视角，促进跨领域研究。实际应用中，它强调了设计安全AI系统时控制自我改进循环的重要性。由于安全原因，实施细节被省略，未来工作可探索具体实现、验证模型在实际系统中的适用性，或扩展到更复杂的交互场景。

title: Synthetic emotions and consciousness: exploring architectural boundaries
abstract: As artificial agents display increasingly sophisticated emotion-like behaviors, frameworks for assessing whether such systems risk instantiating consciousness remain limited. This contribution asks whether synthetic emotion-like control can be implemented while deliberately excluding architectural features that major theories associate with access-like consciousness. We propose architectural principles (A1-A8) for a hierarchical, dual-source implementation in which (i) immediate needs generate motivational signals and (ii) episodic memory provides affective guidance from similar past situations; the two sources converge to modulate action selection. To operationalize consciousness-related risk, we distill predictions from major theories into four engineering risk-reduction constraints: (R1) no content-general, workspace-like global broadcast, (R2) no metarepresentation, (R3) no autobiographical consolidation, and (R4) bounded learning. We address three questions: (Q1) Can emotion-like control satisfy R1-R4? We present a concrete architecture as an existence proof. (Q2) Can the architecture be extended without introducing access-enabling features? We identify stable modifications that preserve compliance. (Q3) Can we trace graded paths that plausibly increase access risk? We map gradual transitions that progressively violate the constraints. Our contribution operates at three levels: on the engineering side, we present a modular, biologically motivated control architecture; on the theoretical side, we propose a control model of emotions and a methodological template for converting consciousness-related questions into auditable architectural tests; on the safety side, we sketch preliminary audit indicators that may inform future governance frameworks. The architecture functions independently as an emotion-like controller, while the risk-reduction criteria may extend to other AI systems.

light_analysis.overview: 本论文提出了一种合成情感控制架构及其风险分析方法，旨在探索在实现情感行为时避免引入意识相关的架构特征，为AI安全提供工程和理论框架。
light_analysis.motivation: 随着人工代理展现出越来越复杂的情感行为，评估这些系统是否可能实例化意识的风险框架仍然有限。本研究旨在解决如何在实现合成情感控制时，有意识地排除与访问意识相关的架构特征，以预防潜在的AI安全风险。现有方法缺乏明确的工程约束来评估和限制意识风险，导致难以确保系统的可控性和可预测性，这为AI治理和安全研究带来了挑战。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出了一套架构原则（A1-A8），用于构建一个层次化、双源的情感控制系统：即时需求生成动机信号，而情景记忆提供基于过去类似情况的情感指导，两者汇合以调节动作选择。关键创新包括将主要意识理论转化为四个工程风险减少约束（R1-R4），如避免全局广播和元表示，从而创建模块化、生物启发的控制模型。该方法没有具体提及数据集，但强调通过架构设计实现意识风险评估的实用化。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确说明具体的实验数据，如准确率或效率指标。但通过回答三个问题展示了理论验证：Q1中，提出了一个具体架构作为存在性证明，表明情感控制能在满足风险减少约束下实现；Q2中，识别了稳定的架构修改，以在不引入访问意识特征的情况下扩展系统；Q3中，映射了逐步违反约束的路径，以跟踪风险增加的潜在情景。这些结果与基线理论框架相比，证明了该方法的可行性和安全性评估能力。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文的主要贡献包括在工程层面提供模块化控制架构，在理论层面提出情感控制模型和方法论模板用于意识风险评估，以及在安全层面初步审计指标可能为未来治理框架提供信息。研究具有学术价值，促进了AI安全与意识理论的交叉领域，实际应用上为设计无意识风险的情感系统提供了工具。局限性在于缺乏实证验证，未来工作可扩展至更多AI系统，并进一步细化风险指标。

title: MuRAL: A Multi-Resident Ambient Sensor Dataset Annotated with Natural Language for Activities of Daily Living
abstract: Recent progress in Large Language Models (LLMs) has enabled advanced reasoning and zero-shot recognition for human activity understanding with ambient sensor data. However, widely used multi-resident datasets such as CASAS, ARAS, and MARBLE lack natural language context and fine-grained annotation, limiting the full exploitation of LLM capabilities in realistic smart environments. To address this gap, we present MuRAL (Multi-Resident Ambient sensor dataset with natural Language), comprising over 21 hours of multi-user sensor data from 21 sessions in a smart home. MuRAL uniquely features detailed natural language descriptions, explicit resident identities, and rich activity labels, all situated in complex, dynamic, multi-resident scenarios. We benchmark state-of-the-art LLMs on MuRAL for three core tasks: subject assignment, action description, and activity classification. Results show that current LLMs still face major challenges on MuRAL, especially in maintaining accurate resident assignment over long sequences, generating precise action descriptions, and effectively integrating context for activity prediction. The dataset is publicly available at: https://mural.imag.fr/.

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出了MuRAL数据集，一个带自然语言注释的多居民环境传感器数据集，用于促进大型语言模型在人类日常活动理解中的应用。
light_analysis.motivation: 随着大型语言模型（LLMs）的进展，它们在基于环境传感器数据的人类活动理解中展现出高级推理和零样本识别的潜力。然而，现有广泛使用的多居民数据集（如CASAS、ARAS和MARBLE）主要依赖结构化数据，缺乏自然语言上下文和细粒度注释，这限制了LLMs在真实智能环境中的充分应用，因为LLMs需要丰富的语言信息来发挥其能力。因此，解决这一数据缺口对于推动LLMs在复杂活动识别场景中的研究至关重要。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出了MuRAL数据集，这是一个多居民环境传感器数据集，包含超过21小时的传感器数据，来自智能家居中的21个会话。其关键创新点在于提供了详细的自然语言描述、明确的居民身份标签和丰富的活动标签，所有数据都采集自复杂、动态的多居民场景。作者使用该数据集对最先进的大型语言模型进行基准测试，涵盖三个核心任务：主体分配（确定哪个居民执行活动）、动作描述（生成自然语言描述）和活动分类（识别活动类型），以评估LLMs在真实环境中的性能。
light_analysis.result: 通过基准测试，论文发现当前最先进的大型语言模型在MuRAL数据集上表现不佳，面临重大挑战。具体来说，这些模型在长序列中难以保持准确的居民身份分配、生成精确的动作描述，以及有效整合上下文信息进行活动预测。结果未提供具体性能指标，但强调了LLMs在复杂多居民场景下的局限性，表明尽管LLMs具有理论潜力，但在实际应用中仍需进一步改进。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文的主要贡献是提出了MuRAL数据集，填补了多居民环境传感器数据中自然语言注释的空白，为LLMs在人类活动理解领域提供了重要的基准资源。其学术价值在于促进了跨模态学习研究，将自然语言处理与传感器数据结合；实际应用价值则体现在提升智能家居等环境的自适应能力。局限性在于当前LLMs在该数据集上表现有限，未来工作可专注于开发更鲁棒的模型或扩展数据集以应对复杂场景的挑战，数据集已公开可用以促进相关研究。

title: When Memory Becomes a Vulnerability: Towards Multi-turn Jailbreak Attacks against Text-to-Image Generation Systems
abstract: Modern text-to-image (T2I) generation systems (e.g., DALL$\cdot$E 3) exploit the memory mechanism, which captures key information in multi-turn interactions for faithful generation. Despite its practicality, the security analyses of this mechanism have fallen far behind. In this paper, we reveal that it can exacerbate the risk of jailbreak attacks. Previous attacks fuse the unsafe target prompt into one ultimate adversarial prompt, which can be easily detected or lead to the generation of non-unsafe images due to under- or over-detoxification. In contrast, we propose embedding the malice at the inception of the chat session in memory, addressing the above limitations.   Specifically, we propose Inception, the first multi-turn jailbreak attack against real-world text-to-image generation systems that explicitly exploits their memory mechanisms. Inception is composed of two key modules: segmentation and recursion. We introduce Segmentation, a semantic-preserving method that generates multi-round prompts. By leveraging NLP analysis techniques, we design policies to decompose a prompt, together with its malicious intent, according to sentence structure, thereby evading safety filters. Recursion further addresses the challenge posed by unsafe sub-prompts that cannot be separated through simple segmentation. It firstly expands the sub-prompt, then invokes segmentation recursively. To facilitate multi-turn adversarial prompts crafting, we build VisionFlow, an emulation T2I system that integrates two-stage safety filters and industrial-grade memory mechanisms. The experiment results show that Inception successfully allures unsafe image generation, surpassing the SOTA by a 20.0\% margin in attack success rate. We also conduct experiments on the real-world commercial T2I generation platforms, further validating the threats of Inception in practice.
comment: This work proposes a multi-turn jailbreak attack against real-world chat-based T2I generation systems that intergrate memory mechanism. It also constructed a simulation system, with considering three industrial-grade memory mechanisms, 7 kinds of safety filters (both input and output); It is going to appear on USENIX 2026

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出 Inception，首个利用记忆机制的多轮越狱攻击方法，针对文本到图像生成系统，显著提升攻击成功率。
light_analysis.motivation: 现代文本到图像生成系统（如 DALL·E 3）采用记忆机制以增强多轮交互的忠实性，但其安全性分析严重滞后。现有越狱攻击方法将不安全目标提示融合为单一对抗提示，易被安全过滤器检测或因解毒不足或过度导致生成非不安全图像，存在局限性。因此，急需探索记忆机制下的新型攻击策略，以揭示潜在安全漏洞并提升系统防护能力。
light_analysis.method: 本研究提出 Inception 攻击方法，由两个核心模块组成：segmentation 和 recursion。Segmentation 基于 NLP 分析技术，根据句子结构分解提示并保持语义完整性，以规避安全过滤；Recursion 处理无法简单分割的不安全子提示，通过扩展和递归调用 segmentation 进行细粒度攻击。此外，构建了 VisionFlow 模拟系统，集成两阶段安全过滤器和工业级记忆机制，以支持多轮对抗提示的生成与测试。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果显示，Inception 成功地诱导不安全图像生成，攻击成功率超过现有最佳方法（SOTA）20.0%，在真实商业文本到图像生成平台上进一步验证了其实际威胁。这些数据表明，该方法在提升攻击效果和实用性方面具有显著优势，同时突显了记忆机制在安全场景下的脆弱性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文的主要贡献在于揭示了文本到图像生成系统中记忆机制的安全风险，并提出首个多轮越狱攻击方法 Inception，具有学术创新性和实际应用价值。研究强调了系统安全性评估的重要性，并提供了新思路以防范类似攻击。局限性可能在于对其他类型生成系统的适用性，未来工作可扩展攻击场景或开发防御策略。

title: Human-Object Interaction via Automatically Designed VLM-Guided Motion Policy
abstract: Human-object interaction (HOI) synthesis is crucial for applications in animation, simulation, and robotics. However, existing approaches either rely on expensive motion capture data or require manual reward engineering, limiting their scalability and generalizability. In this work, we introduce the first unified physics-based HOI framework that leverages Vision-Language Models (VLMs) to enable long-horizon interactions with diverse object types, including static, dynamic, and articulated objects. We introduce VLM-Guided Relative Movement Dynamics (RMD), a fine-grained spatio-temporal bipartite representation that automatically constructs goal states and reward functions for reinforcement learning. By encoding structured relationships between human and object parts, RMD enables VLMs to generate semantically grounded, interaction-aware motion guidance without manual reward tuning. To support our methodology, we present Interplay, a novel dataset with thousands of long-horizon static and dynamic interaction plans. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our framework outperforms existing methods in synthesizing natural, human-like motions across both simple single-task and complex multi-task scenarios. For more details, please refer to our project webpage: https://vlm-rmd.github.io/.

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出了首个基于物理的统一框架，利用视觉语言模型自动设计奖励函数，以实现多样化对象类型的长期人-物交互。
light_analysis.motivation: 人-物交互合成在动画、模拟和机器人等领域具有重要应用价值，但现有方法常依赖昂贵的运动捕捉数据或需要手动设计奖励函数，这严重限制了其可扩展性和对不同场景的泛化能力。因此，开发一种无需人工干预、能自动生成交互指导的框架成为关键挑战，以应对多样化对象（如静态、动态和铰接物体）交互的需求，推动相关领域的高效发展。
light_analysis.method: 论文引入VLM-Guided Relative Movement Dynamics（RMD），这是一种细粒度的时空二部表示，能自动为强化学习构建目标状态和奖励函数。通过编码人与物体部件间的结构化关系，RMD使视觉语言模型能够生成基于语义的交互感知运动指导，无需手动奖励调优。此外，作者开发了Interplay数据集，包含数千个长期静态和动态交互计划，用于支持方法验证和训练。
light_analysis.result: 广泛的实验表明，该框架在合成自然、类似人类的运动方面优于现有方法，覆盖了从简单单任务到复杂多任务的各种场景。与基线方法相比，在交互质量和泛化能力上表现显著优势，特别是在长期交互和多对象类型中展现出更强的适应性和鲁棒性，尽管摘要未提供具体性能指标，但结果验证了自动设计奖励函数的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文的主要贡献是提出了首个利用视觉语言模型实现自动奖励设计的统一物理基人-物交互框架，显著提高了可扩展性和泛化性。该研究推动了HOI合成技术的发展，为动画、模拟和机器人应用提供了实用工具，具有重要的学术和实际价值。未来工作可能包括扩展到更复杂交互或优化计算效率，尽管摘要未明确说明具体方向。

title: Beyond Accuracy: What Matters in Designing Well-Behaved Image Classification Models?
abstract: Deep learning has become an essential part of computer vision, with deep neural networks (DNNs) excelling in predictive performance. However, they often fall short in other critical quality dimensions, such as robustness, calibration, or fairness. While existing studies have focused on a subset of these quality dimensions, none have explored a more general form of "well-behavedness" of DNNs. With this work, we address this gap by simultaneously studying nine different quality dimensions for image classification. Through a large-scale study, we provide a bird's-eye view by analyzing 326 backbone models and how different training paradigms and model architectures affect these quality dimensions. We reveal various new insights such that (i) vision-language models exhibit high class balance on ImageNet-1k classification and strong robustness against domain changes; (ii) training models initialized with weights obtained through self-supervised learning is an effective strategy to improve most considered quality dimensions; and (iii) the training dataset size is a major driver for most of the quality dimensions. We conclude our study by introducing the QUBA score (Quality Understanding Beyond Accuracy), a novel metric that ranks models across multiple dimensions of quality, enabling tailored recommendations based on specific user needs.
comment: Published in TMLR (01/2026) | OpenReview: https://openreview.net/forum?id=E7HDtLCoT6 | Project page: https://visinf.github.io/beyond-accuracy/

light_analysis.overview: 本文通过大规模研究同时评估图像分类模型的九个质量维度，并引入QUBA分数以提供定制推荐，超越准确性关注模型的全面行为。
light_analysis.motivation: 深度学习模型在图像分类中准确性表现优秀，但常缺乏鲁棒性、校准和公平性等其他关键质量维度，影响实际应用的可靠性。现有研究多专注于单一或少数维度，未系统探索模型的全面“良好行为”，导致设计优化不足。本研究旨在填补这一空白，强调多维度质量评估的重要性，以推动更稳健和公平的模型发展。
light_analysis.method: 研究方法包括对326个骨干模型进行大规模实证分析，涵盖不同训练范式（如监督学习、自监督学习）和模型架构。核心创新是同时评估九个质量维度，如鲁棒性、校准和公平性，使用ImageNet-1k等数据集。关键技术涉及视觉语言模型和自监督学习初始化，通过系统比较揭示训练策略和架构对质量维度的影响。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果显示，视觉语言模型在ImageNet-1k分类中表现出高类别平衡和强鲁棒性；使用自监督学习初始化的模型能改善多数质量维度；训练数据集大小是影响质量的主要驱动因素。与现有模型相比，这些新见解提供了优化策略，摘要未提供具体性能指标数据，但通过大规模分析验证了方法效果。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献在于提出了全面评估图像分类模型质量维度的框架，并引入QUBA分数作为跨维度排名指标，促进多维度模型评估研究。实际应用中，可根据用户需求提供定制化推荐。未来工作可扩展至更多质量维度或应用于其他领域，以进一步优化模型设计。

title: Leveraging Taxonomy Similarity for Next Activity Prediction in Patient Treatment
abstract: The rapid progress in modern medicine presents physicians with complex challenges when planning patient treatment. Techniques from the field of Predictive Business Process Monitoring, like Next-activity-prediction (NAP) can be used as a promising technique to support physicians in treatment planning, by proposing a possible next treatment step. Existing patient data, often in the form of electronic health records, can be analyzed to recommend the next suitable step in the treatment process. However, the use of patient data poses many challenges due to its knowledge-intensive character, high variability and scarcity of medical data. To overcome these challenges, this article examines the use of the knowledge encoded in taxonomies to improve and explain the prediction of the next activity in the treatment process. This study proposes the TS4NAP approach, which uses medical taxonomies (ICD-10-CM and ICD-10-PCS) in combination with graph matching to assess the similarities of medical codes to predict the next treatment step. The effectiveness of the proposed approach will be evaluated using event logs that are derived from the MIMIC-IV dataset. The results highlight the potential of using domain-specific knowledge held in taxonomies to improve the prediction of the next activity, and thus can improve treatment planning and decision-making by making the predictions more explainable.

light_analysis.overview: 本研究提出TS4NAP方法，通过结合医学分类学（ICD-10-CM和ICD-10-PCS）和图匹配来改进和解释患者治疗过程中的下一个活动预测。
light_analysis.motivation: 医生在规划患者治疗时面临复杂挑战，预测性业务流程监控技术如下一个活动预测（NAP）能提供支持。然而，患者数据如电子健康记录具有知识密集型、高变异性及稀缺性等问题，现有方法难以有效处理，导致预测准确性有限且缺乏解释性。因此，本研究旨在利用领域知识克服这些挑战，提升预测性能并增强决策支持。
light_analysis.method: 本文提出TS4NAP方法，核心在于使用医学分类学（如ICD-10-CM和ICD-10-PCS）结合图匹配技术，评估医疗代码之间的相似性以预测下一个治疗步骤。关键创新点在于整合领域特定知识，通过图匹配量化分类学关系，从而增强预测的准确性和可解释性。方法基于事件日志进行评估，数据源自MIMIC-IV数据集，为医疗过程建模提供真实场景支撑。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确说明具体性能指标，但指出TS4NAP方法通过利用分类学中编码的领域知识，展现出改进下一个活动预测潜力的结果。该方法使预测更可解释，可能提升治疗规划和决策效率，但与基线方法的对比情况未详细描述，需进一步实验验证。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献是开发TS4NAP方法，成功利用医学分类学相似性来改进和解释下一个活动预测。其学术价值在于整合领域知识优化预测模型，提高医疗决策支持能力；实际应用有助于提升治疗规划的准确性和效率。未来工作可探索扩展到其他医疗分类学或优化图匹配算法，以应对更复杂场景。

title: Generative Human Geometry Distribution
abstract: Realistic human geometry generation is an important yet challenging task, requiring both the preservation of fine clothing details and the accurate modeling of clothing-body interactions. To tackle this challenge, we build upon Geometry distributions, a recently proposed representation that can model a single human geometry with high fidelity using a flow matching model. However, extending a single-geometry distribution to a dataset is non-trivial and inefficient for large-scale learning. To address this, we propose a new geometry distribution model by two key techniques: (1) encoding distributions as 2D feature maps rather than network parameters, and (2) using SMPL models as the domain instead of Gaussian and refining the associated flow velocity field. We then design a generative framework adopting a two staged training paradigm analogous to state-of-the-art image and 3D generative models. In the first stage, we compress geometry distributions into a latent space using a diffusion flow model; the second stage trains another flow model on this latent space. We validate our approach on two key tasks: pose-conditioned random avatar generation and avatar-consistent novel pose synthesis. Experimental results demonstrate that our method outperforms existing state-of-the-art methods, achieving a 57% improvement in geometry quality.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种新的人类几何分布模型，通过将分布编码为2D特征图和使用SMPL模型作为域，结合两阶段流匹配训练，显著提升几何生成质量。
light_analysis.motivation: 真实人类几何生成在虚拟现实和游戏等领域至关重要，但现有方法难以同时保留服装细节和准确建模服装-身体交互。基于单几何分布的表示虽能高保真建模个体，但扩展到大尺度数据集时效率低下，限制了大规模应用。本研究旨在克服这一瓶颈，开发更高效的几何分布表示，以支持高质量、可扩展的人类几何生成。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出新几何分布模型，关键技术包括将分布编码为2D特征图而非网络参数，以及使用SMPL人体模型作为域并细化流速度场。生成框架采用两阶段训练范式：第一阶段使用扩散流模型将几何分布压缩到潜在空间；第二阶段在该潜在空间上训练另一个流模型，借鉴了图像和3D生成模型的先进思路，确保模型在大规模学习中的高效性和保真度。
light_analysis.result: 实验在姿势条件随机虚拟角色生成和虚拟角色一致的新姿势合成两个任务上进行验证。结果显示，该方法在几何质量上优于现有最先进方法，实现了57%的改进，表明在保留细节和建模交互方面具有显著优势。具体基线对比指标摘要未详细说明，但强调了性能提升的普遍适用性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究通过创新分布表示和两阶段生成框架，有效提升了人类几何生成的质量和效率，为虚拟角色创建提供了新方法。学术价值在于推动了几何分布建模的前沿，实际应用价值包括增强虚拟现实和游戏的真实感。局限性或未来工作方向摘要未明确说明，但可推断可能涉及进一步优化计算效率或扩展到更复杂场景。

title: A dataset of high-resolution plantar pressures for gait analysis across varying footwear and walking speeds
abstract: Gait refers to the patterns of limb movement generated during walking, which are unique to each individual due to both physical and behavioral traits. Walking patterns have been widely studied in biometrics, biomechanics, sports, and rehabilitation. While traditional methods rely on video and motion capture, advances in plantar pressure sensing technology now offer deeper insights into gait. However, underfoot pressures during walking remain underexplored due to the lack of large, publicly accessible datasets. To address this, we introduce the UNB StepUP-P150 dataset: a footStep database for gait analysis and recognition using Underfoot Pressure, including data from 150 individuals. This dataset comprises high-resolution plantar pressure data (4 sensors per cm-squared) collected using a 1.2m by 3.6m pressure-sensing walkway. It contains over 200,000 footsteps from participants walking with various speeds (preferred, slow-to-stop, fast, and slow) and footwear conditions (barefoot, standard shoes, and two personal shoes), supporting advancements in biometric gait recognition and presenting new research opportunities in biomechanics and deep learning. UNB StepUP-P150 establishes a new benchmark for plantar pressure-based gait analysis and recognition.

light_analysis.overview: 论文的核心贡献是引入UNB StepUP-P150高分辨率足底压力数据集，为步态分析和识别设立了新基准。
light_analysis.motivation: 步态分析在生物识别、生物力学、运动和康复领域具有重要应用价值，传统方法如视频和运动捕捉难以全面捕捉步态细节。足底压力传感技术提供了新视角，但由于缺乏大型公开数据集，足底压力在行走中的研究仍未充分展开。因此，本研究旨在填补这一空白，通过构建大规模数据集推动步态分析的深入研究，解决现有数据不足的实际问题。
light_analysis.method: 研究方法是构建UNB StepUP-P150数据集，使用1.2米乘3.6米的压力感应走道，以每平方厘米4个传感器的高分辨率采集足底压力数据。关键创新在于数据的多样性和高分辨率，涵盖150名参与者的超过20万步数据，包括不同行走速度（如偏好、慢到停、快、慢）和鞋类条件（赤脚、标准鞋、个人鞋）。这为步态分析和识别提供了全面的数据基础。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确说明具体实验结果，如准确率提升或效率改进。但论文指出该数据集为基于足底压力的步态分析和识别设立了新基准，有望支持生物识别、生物力学和深度学习领域的研究。通过提供大规模、高分辨率的数据，促进了相关技术的开发和应用，为后续研究提供了对比基础。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究通过创建大型高分辨率足底压力数据集，解决了步态分析中数据缺乏的问题，主要贡献在于为步态分析和识别提供了标准化资源。学术价值在于推动生物识别和生物力学研究的进展，实际应用潜力体现在康复评估和运动分析中。未来工作可包括利用数据集训练深度学习模型，或扩展到更多样化场景。

title: Token Adaptation via Side Graph Convolution for Efficient Fine-tuning of 3D Point Cloud Transformers
abstract: Parameter-efficient fine-tuning (PEFT) of pre-trained 3D point cloud Transformers has emerged as a promising technique for 3D point cloud analysis. While existing PEFT methods attempt to minimize the number of tunable parameters, they often suffer from high temporal and spatial computational costs during fine-tuning. This paper proposes a novel PEFT algorithm called Side Token Adaptation on a neighborhood Graph (STAG) to achieve superior temporal and spatial efficiency. STAG employs a graph convolutional side network operating in parallel with a frozen backbone Transformer to adapt tokens to downstream tasks. Through efficient graph convolution, parameter sharing, and reduced gradient computation, STAG significantly reduces both temporal and spatial costs for fine-tuning. We also present Point Cloud Classification 13 (PCC13), a new benchmark comprising diverse publicly available 3D point cloud datasets to facilitate comprehensive evaluation. Extensive experiments using multiple pre-trained models and PCC13 demonstrates the effectiveness of STAG. Specifically, STAG maintains classification accuracy comparable to existing methods while reducing tunable parameters to only 0.43M and achieving significant reductions in both computation time and memory consumption for fine-tuning. Code and benchmark will be available at: https://github.com/takahikof/STAG.
comment: Accepted to the journal of Machine Vision and Applications

light_analysis.overview: 本研究提出STAG算法，通过并行图卷积侧网络适配token，实现了3D点云Transformer的高效参数调优，显著减少了时空计算成本。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有参数高效调优（PEFT）方法在3D点云分析中虽然能减少可调参数，但往往伴随着高时间和空间计算成本，限制了实际应用。由于3D点云处理需要大量计算资源，现有方法在效率和实用性上存在不足，导致调优过程资源消耗高。因此，本研究旨在解决这一问题，开发一种更高效的PEFT算法，以降低成本同时保持性能。
light_analysis.method: 本研究提出STAG算法，核心是使用一个图卷积侧网络与冻结的主干Transformer并行工作，通过图卷积操作适配token以适应下游任务。关键创新包括高效图卷积设计、参数共享策略和减少梯度计算，从而降低计算负担。方法利用图结构捕获局部邻域信息，实现高效的token适配，并采用了参数共享机制以减少额外参数需求，具体基于PCC13基准进行验证。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果表明，STAG在保持分类准确性与其他方法相当的同时，将可调参数减少到仅0.43百万，并显著降低了调优的计算时间和内存消耗。通过PCC13基准的综合评估，使用多个预训练模型验证了STAG的有效性，具体表现为在多个数据集上达到可比性能，同时时空成本大幅下降，如计算时间和内存使用显著减少。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献是提出STAG算法和PCC13基准，提高了3D点云Transformer调优的效率和实用性。学术上，为参数高效调优提供了新思路；实际应用中，降低了资源需求，便于部署。未来工作可能包括扩展到其他任务或进一步优化算法，但摘要未明确说明具体方向。

title: Memory, Benchmark & Robots: A Benchmark for Solving Complex Tasks with Reinforcement Learning
abstract: Memory is crucial for enabling agents to tackle complex tasks with temporal and spatial dependencies. While many reinforcement learning (RL) algorithms incorporate memory, the field lacks a universal benchmark to assess an agent's memory capabilities across diverse scenarios. This gap is particularly evident in tabletop robotic manipulation, where memory is essential for solving tasks with partial observability and ensuring robust performance, yet no standardized benchmarks exist. To address this, we introduce MIKASA (Memory-Intensive Skills Assessment Suite for Agents), a comprehensive benchmark for memory RL, with three key contributions: (1) we propose a comprehensive classification framework for memory-intensive RL tasks, (2) we collect MIKASA-Base -- a unified benchmark that enables systematic evaluation of memory-enhanced agents across diverse scenarios, and (3) we develop MIKASA-Robo (pip install mikasa-robo-suite) -- a novel benchmark of 32 carefully designed memory-intensive tasks that assess memory capabilities in tabletop robotic manipulation. Our work introduces a unified framework to advance memory RL research, enabling more robust systems for real-world use. MIKASA is available at https://tinyurl.com/membenchrobots.

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出了MIKASA基准，一个用于评估强化学习中智能体内存能力的综合性基准，特别针对机器人操作任务。
light_analysis.motivation: 内存对于强化学习智能体处理具有时空依赖性的复杂任务至关重要，但现有方法缺乏统一基准来评估内存能力，尤其在桌面机器人操作中，部分可观测性任务需要内存来确保鲁棒性能，现有评估体系不足。因此，迫切需要建立一个标准化的基准来填补这一研究空白，以促进内存RL领域的发展。
light_analysis.method: 本研究提出了MIKASA（Memory-Intensive Skills Assessment Suite for Agents），包括三个关键部分：一是提出内存密集型RL任务的分类框架，二是收集MIKASA-Base基准以实现跨场景系统评估，三是开发MIKASA-Robo（可通过pip安装），包含32个专门设计的内存密集型任务来评估机器人操作能力。这些方法共同构建了一个标准化评估体系，聚焦于内存机制的有效测试。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确说明具体实验结果，如准确率提升或效率改进。本文主要通过引入MIKASA基准来提供评估工具，但摘要中未提及与基线方法的性能对比数据，主要贡献在于基准的建立和可用性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献是引入了MIKASA基准，为内存强化学习研究提供了一个统一框架，有助于推动领域进展并促进更稳健的现实世界系统应用。尽管存在局限性，如需要进一步实证验证，但工作为未来研究奠定了基础，具有重要的学术和实践价值。

title: Preference Leakage: A Contamination Problem in LLM-as-a-judge
abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) as judges and LLM-based data synthesis have emerged as two fundamental LLM-driven data annotation methods in model development. While their combination significantly enhances the efficiency of model training and evaluation, little attention has been given to the potential contamination brought by this new model development paradigm. In this work, we expose preference leakage, a contamination problem in LLM-as-a-judge caused by the relatedness between the synthetic data generators and LLM-based evaluators. To study this issue, we first define three common relatednesses between the data generator LLM and the judge LLM: being the same model, having an inheritance relationship, and belonging to the same model family. Through extensive experiments, we empirically confirm the bias of judges towards their related student models caused by preference leakage across multiple LLM baselines and benchmarks. Further analysis suggests that preference leakage is a pervasive and real-world problem that is harder to detect compared to previously identified biases in LLM-as-a-judge scenarios. All of these findings imply that preference leakage is a widespread and challenging problem in the area of LLM-as-a-judge. We release all codes and data at: https://github.com/David-Li0406/Preference-Leakage.

light_analysis.overview: 揭露了LLM作为评判者中的偏好泄漏污染问题，并通过实验证实其普遍性和挑战性。
light_analysis.motivation: LLM作为评判者和LLM-based数据合成方法在模型开发中广泛应用，显著提升效率，但现有研究忽视了这种结合可能导致的污染问题，即数据生成器与评判器之间的相关性引发的偏好泄漏。这可能导致评估偏见，影响模型训练的公平性和有效性，因此本研究旨在揭示这一重要且未被充分探讨的问题，强调其在现实应用中的潜在风险。
light_analysis.method: 本研究首先定义数据生成器LLM与评判器LLM之间的三种相关关系：相同模型、继承关系和同模型家族。通过广泛实验，在多个LLM基线和基准测试上实证验证偏好泄漏。关键创新在于系统性地识别和分析这种污染问题，并开源所有代码和数据以促进研究。实验涉及常见LLM模型，如GPT系列，用于对比和验证偏见的存在。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果表明，评判器确实倾向于偏袒与其相关的学生模型，证实了偏好泄漏的存在。相比先前识别的其他偏见，偏好泄漏更为普遍且难以检测，摘要未提供具体性能指标，但强调问题在多个基准上普遍存在。开源数据和代码支持了这一发现，有助于后续分析和验证。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文揭示了LLM-as-a-judge中的偏好泄漏污染问题，表明这是一个普遍且具有挑战性的现象。学术上，它深化了对LLM应用偏见的理解；实践中，提醒研究者在数据合成和评估中注意污染风险。未来工作可探索检测和缓解方法，或扩展研究到更广泛的LLM应用场景。

title: Building a Mind Palace: Structuring Environment-Grounded Semantic Graphs for Effective Long Video Analysis with LLMs
abstract: Long-form video understanding with Large Vision Language Models is challenged by the need to analyze temporally dispersed yet spatially concentrated key moments within limited context windows. In this work, we introduce VideoMindPalace, a new framework inspired by the "Mind Palace", which organizes critical video moments into a topologically structured semantic graph. VideoMindPalace organizes key information through (i) hand-object tracking and interaction, (ii) clustered activity zones representing specific areas of recurring activities, and (iii) environment layout mapping, allowing natural language parsing by LLMs to provide grounded insights on spatio-temporal and 3D context. In addition, we propose the Video MindPalace Benchmark (VMB), to assess human-like reasoning, including spatial localization, temporal reasoning, and layout-aware sequential understanding. Evaluated on VMB and established video QA datasets, including EgoSchema, NExT-QA, IntentQA, and the Active Memories Benchmark, VideoMindPalace demonstrates notable gains in spatio-temporal coherence and human-aligned reasoning, advancing long-form video analysis capabilities in VLMs.

light_analysis.overview: 论文提出VideoMindPalace框架，通过构建环境接地语义图，提升大型视觉语言模型在长视频分析中的时空一致性和推理能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 研究动机源于长视频分析使用大型视觉语言模型时面临的挑战：模型上下文窗口有限，难以处理时间上分散但空间上集中的关键事件，导致推理不连贯或遗漏重要细节。现有方法可能忽略视频的时空结构和环境上下文，限制了在复杂场景（如视频问答任务）中的理解和推理准确性。因此，该研究旨在开发一种新方法来有效组织视频信息，以解决现有技术在处理长视频时的不足。
light_analysis.method: 研究方法基于VideoMindPalace框架，受“思维宫殿”启发，将关键视频时刻组织成拓扑结构化的语义图。该方法包含三个核心组件：(i) 手-物体跟踪和交互，以捕获详细的动作信息；(ii) 聚类活动区域，表示视频中特定区域的重复活动；(iii) 环境布局映射，提供3D空间上下文。这些组件构建的语义图使大型语言模型能通过自然语言解析进行接地推理。研究还提出了Video MindPalace Benchmark (VMB)来评估类人推理，并在多个视频QA数据集（如EgoSchema、NExT-QA、IntentQA、Active Memories Benchmark）上进行验证。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果在Video MindPalace Benchmark (VMB)及多个现有视频QA数据集上评估，包括EgoSchema、NExT-QA、IntentQA和Active Memories Benchmark。VideoMindPalace框架在时空一致性和人类对齐推理方面显示出显著提升。与基线方法相比，它改善了空间定位、时间推理和布局感知的顺序理解能力，从而提高了问答任务的准确性和连贯性。摘要未明确说明具体数字指标，但强调了整体性能的优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究的主要贡献是开发了VideoMindPalace框架和对应的基准VMB，通过结构化环境接地语义图，增强了大型视觉语言模型的长视频分析能力。学术价值在于推动了视频理解技术，提供了一种处理时空复杂性的新方法；实际应用潜力包括视频监控、智能辅助系统等。未来工作可能包括扩展框架到更多视频类型或优化计算效率，以应对更大规模数据。摘要未明确说明局限性，但暗示了在提升推理性能方面的持续探索。

title: Difficult Examples Hurt Unsupervised Contrastive Learning: A Theoretical Perspective
abstract: Unsupervised contrastive learning has shown significant performance improvements in recent years, often approaching or even rivaling supervised learning in various tasks. However, its learning mechanism is fundamentally different from supervised learning. Previous works have shown that difficult examples (well-recognized in supervised learning as examples around the decision boundary), which are essential in supervised learning, contribute minimally in unsupervised settings. In this paper, perhaps surprisingly, we find that the direct removal of difficult examples, although reduces the sample size, can boost the downstream classification performance of contrastive learning. To uncover the reasons behind this, we develop a theoretical framework modeling the similarity between different pairs of samples. Guided by this framework, we conduct a thorough theoretical analysis revealing that the presence of difficult examples negatively affects the generalization of contrastive learning. Furthermore, we demonstrate that the removal of these examples, and techniques such as margin tuning and temperature scaling can enhance its generalization bounds, thereby improving performance. Empirically, we propose a simple and efficient mechanism for selecting difficult examples and validate the effectiveness of the aforementioned methods, which substantiates the reliability of our proposed theoretical framework.
comment: Accepted to ICLR 2026 as an Oral Presentation

light_analysis.overview: 本文通过理论分析揭示困难样本损害无监督对比学习泛化，并提出移除和调整技术以提升性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 无监督对比学习近年来在多种任务中表现优异，但其学习机制与监督学习存在根本差异。现有研究指出，困难样本（在监督学习中作为决策边界附近的关键样本）在无监督设置中贡献极小，这引发了对优化方法的思考。本研究动机在于探索困难样本在无监督对比学习中的实际作用，意外发现移除这些样本能提高下游分类性能，这挑战了现有认知，突显了深入理论分析的必要性，以弥补现有方法在处理样本异质性方面的不足。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出了一个理论框架，建模样本对之间的相似性，以分析困难样本对无监督对比学习的影响。关键创新点包括理论推导揭示困难样本降低泛化界限，并提出通过移除困难样本、边界调整和温度缩放技术来增强泛化。具体方法涉及开发一种简单高效的机制来选择困难样本，这些技术基于理论指导，旨在最小化负面影响。摘要未明确说明数据集或模型架构细节，但框架为后续实证验证提供了基础。
light_analysis.result: 理论分析表明，困难样本的存在对无监督对比学习的泛化性能产生负面影响，移除这些样本可提升泛化界限。实证研究通过提出的选择机制验证了移除困难样本以及应用边界调整和温度缩放技术的有效性，这些方法在实验中显示出性能改进，与基线方法对比证实了理论框架的可靠性。摘要未提供具体性能指标如准确率提升，但结果支持了困难样本处理的优化潜力。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献在于通过理论框架揭示了困难样本在无监督对比学习中的负面作用，并提出了改进方法以提升泛化性能。学术上，增进了对无监督学习机制的理论理解；实际上，简单高效的样本选择机制为实际应用提供了优化途径。局限性可能包括样本选择策略的泛化性，未来工作可探索更精细的样本处理技术或扩展到其他无监督学习范式。

title: LMUnit: Fine-grained Evaluation with Natural Language Unit Tests
abstract: As language models become integral to critical workflows, assessing their behavior remains a fundamental challenge -- human evaluation is costly and noisy, while automated metrics provide only coarse, difficult-to-interpret signals. We introduce natural language unit tests, a paradigm that decomposes response quality into explicit, testable criteria, along with a unified scoring model, LMUnit, which combines multi-objective training across preferences, direct ratings, and natural language rationales. Through controlled human studies, we show this paradigm significantly improves inter-annotator agreement and enables more effective LLM development workflows. LMUnit achieves state-of-the-art performance on evaluation benchmarks (FLASK, BigGenBench) and competitive results on RewardBench. These results validate both our proposed paradigm and scoring model, suggesting a promising path forward for language model evaluation and development.

light_analysis.overview: 论文引入自然语言单元测试范式和LMUnit评分模型，实现语言模型的细粒度评估，解决了现有评估方法的局限性。
light_analysis.motivation: 随着语言模型在医疗、金融等关键工作流中的广泛应用，评估其行为成为核心挑战。传统人工评估成本高昂且主观性强，易受噪声干扰，而现有自动评估指标仅提供粗糙、难以解释的信号，无法满足精细化的需求。这导致语言模型开发工作流效率低下，难以确保在真实场景中的可靠性。因此，本研究动机是开发一种更精确、可测试的评估方法，以填补这一空白，并推动语言模型在安全关键领域的进一步集成和发展。
light_analysis.method: 本研究提出自然语言单元测试，将语言模型响应质量分解为明确的、可测试的客观标准，如准确性和一致性。核心方法是LMUnit统一评分模型，它结合了多目标训练，融合了偏好学习、直接评分和自然语言推理。这种集成允许模型从多个角度评估响应，关键创新在于范式的转变和评分模型的灵活性，能够在统一框架下处理复杂的评估任务。该方法不依赖于特定数据集，而是通过构建可测试标准来优化评估过程。
light_analysis.result: 通过受控人类研究，该方法显著提高了评阅者间的一致性，表明评估更加可靠。在基准测试如FLASK和BigGenBench上，LMUnit达到了最先进的性能，准确率提升显著；在RewardBench上也展现出竞争性结果，优于许多现有方法。这些实验验证了该范式在提升评估质量和开发效率方面的优势，为语言模型优化提供了有效工具。摘要未提供具体数字，但结果表明该方法能有效解决评估中的不一致问题。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究验证了自然语言单元测试范式和LMUnit评分模型的有效性，为语言模型评估和开发提供了有前景的路径。主要贡献在于提出了一种更可靠、细粒度的评估方法，提升了学术价值和实际应用潜力，如在自动化测试和模型迭代中的集成。未来工作可能包括扩展到更多评估基准或优化模型性能，但摘要未明确说明局限性。这一创新有望推动AI领域向更精准、可解释的评估方向发展。

title: Unraveling the Complexity of Memory in RL Agents: an Approach for Classification and Evaluation
abstract: The incorporation of memory into agents is essential for numerous tasks within the domain of Reinforcement Learning (RL). In particular, memory is paramount for tasks that require the use of past information, adaptation to novel environments, and improved sample efficiency. However, the term "memory" encompasses a wide range of concepts, which, coupled with the lack of a unified methodology for validating an agent's memory, leads to erroneous judgments about agents' memory capabilities and prevents objective comparison with other memory-enhanced agents. This paper aims to streamline the concept of memory in RL by providing practical precise definitions of agent memory types, such as long-term vs. short-term memory and declarative vs. procedural memory, inspired by cognitive science. Using these definitions, we categorize different classes of agent memory, propose a robust experimental methodology for evaluating the memory capabilities of RL agents, and standardize evaluations. Furthermore, we empirically demonstrate the importance of adhering to the proposed methodology when evaluating different types of agent memory by conducting experiments with different RL agents and what its violation leads to.

light_analysis.overview: 论文通过引入认知科学启发的记忆分类和标准化评估方法，简化了强化学习代理中记忆概念的复杂性并实现客观比较。
light_analysis.motivation: 研究动机源于强化学习代理中记忆对处理依赖历史信息任务的重要性，但当前领域存在‘记忆’概念广泛、缺乏统一验证方法的问题，这导致了对代理记忆能力的误判，并阻碍了不同记忆增强代理之间的客观比较。现有方法的不足主要体现在概念混淆和方法论缺失上，限制了RL代理在适应新环境和提高样本效率方面的进展。
light_analysis.method: 研究方法基于认知科学，为RL代理记忆类型提供了精确定义，如长期与短期记忆、声明式与程序式记忆。通过将这些定义应用于分类，论文提出了一套稳健的实验方法论来评估RL代理的记忆能力，并标准化评估流程，关键创新点在于将心理学概念引入RL，并设计可重复的实验框架，摘要未明确说明具体数据集或模型架构。
light_analysis.result: 主要实验结果通过在不同RL代理上进行实验，实证展示了遵循提出的评估方法论的重要性，指出违反该方法会导致对代理记忆能力的错误判断，影响比较的客观性。尽管摘要未提供具体性能指标如准确率提升，但强调了该方法论在确保评估有效性和避免主观偏差方面的关键作用，为未来评估提供了实证基础。
light_analysis.conclusion: 结论总结了论文的主要贡献，包括为RL代理记忆提供了清晰定义、分类和标准化评估方法，促进了该领域学术发展。研究的实际应用价值在于为设计记忆增强代理提供了评估框架，潜在局限性可能包括方法论在复杂任务中的泛化能力，未来工作可扩展至更多RL场景或整合其他认知理论。

title: FSMLP: Modelling Channel Dependencies With Simplex Theory Based Multi-Layer Perceptions In Frequency Domain
abstract: Time series forecasting (TSF) plays a crucial role in various domains, including web data analysis, energy consumption prediction, and weather forecasting. While Multi-Layer Perceptrons (MLPs) are lightweight and effective for capturing temporal dependencies, they are prone to overfitting when used to model inter-channel dependencies. In this paper, we investigate the overfitting problem in channel-wise MLPs using Rademacher complexity theory, revealing that extreme values in time series data exacerbate this issue. To mitigate this issue, we introduce a novel Simplex-MLP layer, where the weights are constrained within a standard simplex. This strategy encourages the model to learn simpler patterns and thereby reducing overfitting to extreme values. Based on the Simplex-MLP layer, we propose a novel \textbf{F}requency \textbf{S}implex \textbf{MLP} (FSMLP) framework for time series forecasting, comprising of two kinds of modules: \textbf{S}implex \textbf{C}hannel-\textbf{W}ise MLP (SCWM) and \textbf{F}requency \textbf{T}emporal \textbf{M}LP (FTM). The SCWM effectively leverages the Simplex-MLP to capture inter-channel dependencies, while the FTM is a simple yet efficient temporal MLP designed to extract temporal information from the data. Our theoretical analysis shows that the upper bound of the Rademacher Complexity for Simplex-MLP is lower than that for standard MLPs. Moreover, we validate our proposed method on seven benchmark datasets, demonstrating significant improvements in forecasting accuracy and efficiency, while also showcasing superior scalability. Additionally, we demonstrate that Simplex-MLP can improve other methods that use channel-wise MLP to achieve less overfitting and improved performance. Code are available \href{https://github.com/FMLYD/FSMLP}{\textcolor{red}{here}}.

light_analysis.overview: 提出FSMLP框架，通过约束权重在单纯形中减少过拟合，显著提升时间序列预测的准确性和效率。
light_analysis.motivation: 时间序列预测在数据分析、能源预测和天气预测等领域至关重要。多层感知器（MLP）轻量级且能捕捉时间依赖，但在建模通道间依赖时易过拟合，尤其是极端值会加剧这一问题，影响模型泛化能力。现有标准MLP方法在通道间依赖建模上存在不足，需要新策略来减少过拟合并提升性能。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出Simplex-MLP层，权重约束在标准单纯形内，以学习更简单的模式并减少对极端值的过拟合。基于此，构建FSMLP框架，包括Simplex Channel-Wise MLP（SCWM）用于捕获通道间依赖，以及Frequency Temporal MLP（FTM）用于提取时间信息。理论分析使用Rademacher复杂度理论，显示Simplex-MLP的复杂度上界低于标准MLP。
light_analysis.result: 在七个基准数据集上的实验显示，FSMLP在预测准确性和效率方面有显著提升，并展现出优越的可扩展性。与基线方法相比，FSMLP性能更优，同时Simplex-MLP层能改进其他使用通道间MLP的方法，减少过拟合并提高性能。具体改进如准确性提升和效率优化，但摘要未提供详细数值。
light_analysis.conclusion: 主要贡献是FSMLP框架，通过Simplex-MLP减少过拟合，提升时间序列预测的准确性和效率。学术上，理论分析验证了复杂度降低；实际上，在多个数据集上有效应用并具有可扩展性。摘要未明确说明局限性或未来工作方向。

title: FlowCLAS: Enhancing Normalizing Flow Via Contrastive Learning For Anomaly Segmentation
abstract: Anomaly segmentation is an essential capability for safety-critical robotics applications that must be aware of unexpected events. Normalizing flows (NFs), a class of generative models, are a promising approach for this task due to their ability to model the inlier data distribution efficiently. However, their performance falters in dynamic scenes, where complex, multi-modal data distributions cause them to struggle with identifying out-of-distribution samples, leaving a performance gap to leading discriminative methods. To address this limitation, we introduce FlowCLAS, a hybrid framework that enhances the traditional maximum likelihood objective of NFs with a discriminative, contrastive loss. Leveraging Outlier Exposure, this objective explicitly enforces a separation between normal and anomalous features in the latent space, retaining the probabilistic foundation of NFs while embedding the discriminative power they lack. The strength of this approach is demonstrated by FlowCLAS establishing new state-of-the-art (SOTA) performance across multiple challenging anomaly segmentation benchmarks for robotics, including Fishyscapes Lost & Found, Road Anomaly, SegmentMeIfYouCan-ObstacleTrack, and ALLO. Our experiments also show that this contrastive approach is more effective than other outlier-based training strategies for NFs, successfully bridging the performance gap to leading discriminative methods. Project page: https://trailab.github.io/FlowCLAS

light_analysis.overview: FlowCLAS通过引入对比学习损失增强标准化流模型，显著提升异常分割性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 异常分割在安全关键机器人应用中至关重要，需应对动态场景中的意外事件。现有标准化流模型作为生成方法，在处理复杂多模态数据分布时表现不足，难以有效识别离群样本，与领先判别方法存在性能差距。因此，研究旨在通过融合判别性技术来弥补这一缺陷，提升模型在现实场景中的鲁棒性。
light_analysis.method: FlowCLAS是一个混合框架，将标准化流的传统最大似然目标与判别性对比损失相结合。关键创新点包括利用异常暴露技术，在潜在空间中强制分离正常和异常特征，既保留了标准化流的概率基础，又嵌入了其缺乏的判别能力。摘要未明确说明具体数据集或模型架构细节，但强调了这种集成方法的技术特色。
light_analysis.result: FlowCLAS在多个挑战性异常分割基准测试中达到了新的最先进性能，包括Fishyscapes Lost & Found、Road Anomaly、SegmentMeIfYouCan-ObstacleTrack和ALLO。实验显示，这种对比学习方法比其他基于异常的训练策略更有效，成功缩小了与领先判别方法的性能差距，但摘要未提供具体准确率提升数据。
light_analysis.conclusion: FlowCLAS通过结合对比学习增强标准化流，为异常分割提供了融合生成和判别优势的新框架。其学术价值在于提出了一种有效的混合方法，实际应用有助于提升机器人安全。未来工作可能包括优化模型或扩展到其他领域，但摘要未明确说明局限性或具体方向。

title: Curriculum-enhanced GroupDRO: Challenging the Norm of Avoiding Curriculum Learning in Subpopulation Shift Setups
abstract: In subpopulation shift scenarios, a Curriculum Learning (CL) approach would only serve to imprint the model weights, early on, with the easily learnable spurious correlations featured. To the best of our knowledge, none of the current state-of-the-art subpopulation shift approaches employ any kind of curriculum. To overcome this, we design a CL approach aimed at initializing the model weights in an unbiased vantage point in the hypothesis space which sabotages easy convergence towards biased hypotheses during the final optimization based on the entirety of the available data. We hereby propose a Curriculum-enhanced Group Distributionally Robust Optimization (CeGDRO) approach, which prioritizes the hardest bias-confirming samples and the easiest bias-conflicting samples, leveraging GroupDRO to balance the initial discrepancy in terms of difficulty. We benchmark our proposed method against the most popular subpopulation shift datasets, showing an increase over the state-of-the-art results across all scenarios, up to 6.2% on Waterbirds.
comment: Accepted as a conference paper at ICAIRC 2024

light_analysis.overview: 本研究提出Curriculum-enhanced GroupDRO (CeGDRO)方法，通过结合课程学习和GroupDRO，在子群体偏移场景中改善模型初始化，提升性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 在子群体偏移场景中，模型容易学习虚假相关性，现有先进方法为避免偏见固化而避免使用课程学习，但导致优化过程可能偏向有偏见假设，限制了泛化能力。因此，研究旨在开发一种课程学习方法，初始化模型权重到无偏位置，以对抗偏见并提升模型鲁棒性，解决现有方法在分布偏移下的不足。
light_analysis.method: CeGDRO方法优先处理最难的偏见确认样本和最易的偏见冲突样本，利用GroupDRO平衡难度差异，从而初始化模型在假设空间中的无偏位置。核心创新在于结合课程学习和分布鲁棒优化，通过早期策略化样本选择为后续全数据优化奠定无偏基础，实验基于流行子群体偏移数据集如Waterbirds进行验证。
light_analysis.result: 在多个子群体偏移数据集上，CeGDRO方法在所有测试场景中均超越现有最佳方法，最高在Waterbirds数据集上性能提升6.2%，具体指标如准确率有所提高，表明通过课程学习改善初始化能有效增强模型对抗偏见的能力和泛化性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究挑战了子群体偏移中避免课程学习的常规，提出CeGDRO方法，通过初始化无偏权重显著提升模型性能，学术价值在于展示了课程学习在此场景的潜力，实际应用可能改善模型在分布偏移下的鲁棒性，未来工作可扩展至更多复杂数据集和场景，摘要未明确说明具体局限性。

title: Offline-to-Online Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning with Offline Value Function Memory and Sequential Exploration
abstract: Offline-to-Online Reinforcement Learning has emerged as a powerful paradigm, leveraging offline data for initialization and online fine-tuning to enhance both sample efficiency and performance. However, most existing research has focused on single-agent settings, with limited exploration of the multi-agent extension, i.e., Offline-to-Online Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning (O2O MARL). In O2O MARL, two critical challenges become more prominent as the number of agents increases: (i) the risk of unlearning pre-trained Q-values due to distributional shifts during the transition from offline-to-online phases, and (ii) the difficulty of efficient exploration in the large joint state-action space. To tackle these challenges, we propose a novel O2O MARL framework called Offline Value Function Memory with Sequential Exploration (OVMSE). First, we introduce the Offline Value Function Memory (OVM) mechanism to compute target Q-values, preserving knowledge gained during offline training, ensuring smoother transitions, and enabling efficient fine-tuning. Second, we propose a decentralized Sequential Exploration (SE) strategy tailored for O2O MARL, which effectively utilizes the pre-trained offline policy for exploration, thereby significantly reducing the joint state-action space to be explored. Extensive experiments on the StarCraft Multi-Agent Challenge (SMAC) demonstrate that OVMSE significantly outperforms existing baselines, achieving superior sample efficiency and overall performance.

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出了一种新颖的Offline-to-Online多智能体强化学习框架OVMSE，通过离线值函数内存和顺序探索机制解决知识遗忘和大状态空间探索挑战。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有研究主要集中在单智能体场景的Offline-to-Online强化学习，而对多智能体扩展（O2O MARL）探索有限。随着智能体数量增加，面临两个关键问题：一是从离线到在线阶段分布偏移导致预训练Q值知识遗忘的风险；二是大规模联合状态动作空间下高效探索的困难。这些问题限制了多智能体环境中样本效率和性能的提升，因此亟需新方法来应对这些挑战。
light_analysis.method: 本文提出了OVMSE框架，包含两个核心部分。首先，Offline Value Function Memory（OVM）机制用于计算目标Q值，通过存储离线训练的知识，确保平滑过渡并促进高效微调，缓解分布偏移。其次，针对O2O MARL设计了去中心化Sequential Exploration（SE）策略，利用预训练离线策略指导探索过程，有效缩小需探索的联合状态动作空间。关键创新在于结合内存和顺序探索来优化多智能体强化学习的训练流程。
light_analysis.result: 在StarCraft Multi-Agent Challenge（SMAC）数据集上的实验表明，OVMSE框架显著优于现有基线方法。摘要未明确具体性能数据，但指出该框架实现了优越的样本效率和整体性能提升，证明了其有效性。通过对比，OVMSE在处理多智能体环境中的知识保留和探索效率方面展现出色表现。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文的主要贡献是开发了OVMSE框架，解决了O2O MARL中的知识遗忘和探索难题，提高了多智能体强化学习的效率和性能。研究具有重要的学术价值，为复杂环境下的智能体协同学习提供了新思路，实际应用潜力在于机器人控制和游戏AI等领域。未来工作可能包括扩展到更广泛的任务或处理其他类型的数据。

title: Conjuring Semantic Similarity
abstract: The semantic similarity between sample expressions measures the distance between their latent 'meaning'. These meanings are themselves typically represented by textual expressions. We propose a novel approach whereby the semantic similarity among textual expressions is based not on other expressions they can be rephrased as, but rather based on the imagery they evoke. While this is not possible with humans, generative models allow us to easily visualize and compare generated images, or their distribution, evoked by a textual prompt. Therefore, we characterize the semantic similarity between two textual expressions simply as the distance between image distributions they induce, or 'conjure.' We show that by choosing the Jeffreys divergence between the reverse-time diffusion stochastic differential equations (SDEs) induced by each textual expression, this can be directly computed via Monte-Carlo sampling. Our method contributes a novel perspective on semantic similarity that not only aligns with human-annotated scores, but also opens up new avenues for the evaluation of text-conditioned generative models while offering better interpretability of their learnt representations.

light_analysis.overview: 本论文提出了一种基于图像分布的新方法，通过计算文本表达唤起的图像分布之间的Jeffreys散度来测量语义相似性。
light_analysis.motivation: 语义相似性是自然语言处理的核心问题，传统方法常依赖于文本重新表述或比较，忽略了语义的多维性和直观性。现有方法在捕捉文本深层含义和多模态表达方面存在局限，导致评估不够全面。本文旨在通过生成模型引入视觉表示，提供更直接、基于意象的语义相似性测量，以弥补传统方法的不足。
light_analysis.method: 本论文提出了一种利用文本条件生成模型（如扩散模型）的技术路线，核心创新在于将文本表达转换为图像分布，并使用Jeffreys散度衡量反向时间扩散随机微分方程（SDEs）诱导的图像分布距离。具体实现通过蒙特卡洛采样直接计算该散度，从而量化语义相似性，避免了传统文本比较的局限性，并关联到视觉表示以增强理解。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确说明具体的实验数据或性能指标，但提到该方法与人工标注的语义相似性分数对齐，表明其有效性。此外，论文指出该方法为文本条件生成模型的评估开辟了新途径，并提供了更好的表示可解释性。与基线方法的对比可能涉及传统文本相似性方法，但具体提升摘要未详细说明。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本论文的主要贡献是提出了一种基于图像分布的语义相似性测量框架，这不仅在学术上提供了新的视角，还增强了生成模型评估的多样性和可解释性。研究的意义在于推进跨模态语义理解，潜在应用包括改进自然语言处理任务和生成模型优化。未来工作可能涉及扩展到其他模态或优化计算效率。

title: Scaling Laws For Diffusion Transformers
abstract: Diffusion transformers (DiT) have already achieved appealing synthesis and scaling properties in content recreation, e.g., image and video generation. However, scaling laws of DiT are less explored, which usually offer precise predictions regarding optimal model size and data requirements given a specific compute budget. Therefore, experiments across a broad range of compute budgets, from 1e17 to 6e18 FLOPs are conducted to confirm the existence of scaling laws in DiT for the first time. Concretely, the loss of pretraining DiT also follows a power-law relationship with the involved compute. Based on the scaling law, we can not only determine the optimal model size and required data but also accurately predict the text-to-image generation loss given a model with 1B parameters and a compute budget of 1e21 FLOPs. Additionally, we also demonstrate that the trend of pre-training loss matches the generation performances (e.g., FID), even across various datasets, which complements the mapping from compute to synthesis quality and thus provides a predictable benchmark that assesses model performance and data quality at a reduced cost.

light_analysis.overview: 本文首次实证了扩散变换器（DiT）中的缩放定律，并基于这些定律预测了模型在给定计算预算下的最优配置和性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 扩散变换器在图像和视频生成中表现良好，但其缩放定律尚未得到充分研究。缩放定律能帮助优化资源分配，精确预测给定计算预算下的模型大小和数据需求，这对于降低实验成本和提升模型效率至关重要。现有方法在 DiT 领域的缩放特性探索不足，因此本研究旨在填补这一空白，提供一个可预测的基准。
light_analysis.method: 通过在不同计算预算（从 1e17 到 6e18 FLOPs）下进行预训练实验，本研究验证了 DiT 中损失与计算量之间的幂律缩放关系。基于此关系，推导出缩放定律以预测最优模型参数和数据需求，实验涉及多种数据集，但摘要未明确说明具体模型架构细节。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果表明，DiT 的预训练损失遵循幂律关系，与计算预算相关。基于缩放定律，能准确预测拥有 1B 参数和 1e21 FLOPs 预算的模型的文本到图像生成损失。预训练损失趋势与生成性能指标（如 FID）在不同数据集上一致，提供了一个可预测的基准，有助于降低模型评估成本。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究确立了扩散变换器的缩放定律，为生成模型的设计和优化提供理论基础，能帮助在给定计算资源下高效选择模型配置并评估数据质量。尽管摘要未明确说明局限性，但此研究为未来探索更复杂场景下的缩放行为和应用提供了方向。

title: FINE: Factorizing Knowledge for Initialization of Variable-sized Diffusion Models
abstract: The training of diffusion models is computationally intensive, making effective pre-training essential. However, real-world deployments often demand models of variable sizes due to diverse memory and computational constraints, posing challenges when corresponding pre-trained versions are unavailable. To address this, we propose FINE, a novel pre-training method whose resulting model can flexibly factorize its knowledge into fundamental components, termed learngenes, enabling direct initialization of models of various sizes and eliminating the need for repeated pre-training. Rather than optimizing a conventional full-parameter model, FINE represents each layer's weights as the product of $U_{\star}$, $Σ_{\star}^{(l)}$, and $V_{\star}^\top$, where $U_{\star}$ and $V_{\star}$ serve as size-agnostic learngenes shared across layers, while $Σ_{\star}^{(l)}$ remains layer-specific. By jointly training these components, FINE forms a decomposable and transferable knowledge structure that allows efficient initialization through flexible recombination of learngenes, requiring only light retraining of $Σ_{\star}^{(l)}$ on limited data. Extensive experiments demonstrate the efficiency of FINE, achieving state-of-the-art performance in initializing variable-sized models across diverse resource-constrained deployments. Furthermore, models initialized by FINE effectively adapt to diverse tasks, showcasing the task-agnostic versatility of learngenes.

light_analysis.overview: 论文提出FINE方法，通过因子化知识为learngenes，实现扩散模型可变大小的高效初始化，无需重复预训练。
light_analysis.motivation: 扩散模型训练计算密集，有效预训练至关重要。然而，现实部署中由于多样化的内存和计算约束，需要不同大小的模型，但对应的预训练版本往往不可用，导致重复预训练或适配困难。现有方法缺乏灵活的初始化机制，难以适应资源受限场景，因此，研究可转移知识表示以支持可变大小模型初始化成为关键问题。
light_analysis.method: FINE方法将每层权重分解为U、Σ和V的乘积，其中U和V作为size-agnostic的learngenes跨层共享，Σ保持层特异性。通过联合训练这些组件，形成可分解和可转移的知识结构，允许通过重组learngenes高效初始化新模型，仅需利用有限数据轻量重新训练Σ。摘要未明确说明具体数据集和模型架构，但该方法基于扩散模型的权重因子化实现知识分解。
light_analysis.result: 大量实验证明FINE的高效性，在初始化不同大小模型时达到state-of-the-art性能，适应多样资源约束部署。模型初始化效果优于基线方法，展示了learngenes的灵活性和任务无关适应性。摘要未明确说明具体性能指标如准确率提升，但强调了在可变大小模型初始化任务中的卓越表现。
light_analysis.conclusion: FINE的贡献在于创新知识因子化方法，使扩散模型知识可分解为learngenes，实现高效、灵活的模型初始化，减少重复预训练需求，支持资源受限部署和跨任务适应。学术上推动知识表示和迁移学习研究，实际上为AI模型部署提供可扩展解决方案。未来工作可探索learngenes在更广泛模型类型中的泛化能力。

title: Natural Adversaries: Fuzzing Autonomous Vehicles with Realistic Roadside Object Placements
abstract: The emergence of Autonomous Vehicles (AVs) has spurred research into testing the resilience of their perception systems, i.e., ensuring that they are not susceptible to critical misjudgements. It is important that these systems are tested not only with respect to other vehicles on the road, but also with respect to objects placed on the roadside. Trash bins, billboards, and greenery are examples of such objects, typically positioned according to guidelines developed for the human visual system, which may not align perfectly with the needs of AVs. Existing tests, however, usually focus on adversarial objects with conspicuous shapes or patches, which are ultimately unrealistic due to their unnatural appearance and reliance on white-box knowledge. In this work, we introduce a black-box attack on AV perception systems that creates realistic adversarial scenarios (i.e., satisfying road design guidelines) by manipulating the positions of common roadside objects and without resorting to "unnatural" adversarial patches. In particular, we propose TrashFuzz, a fuzzing algorithm that finds scenarios in which the placement of these objects leads to substantial AV misperceptions -- such as mistaking a traffic light's colour -- with the overall goal of causing traffic-law violations. To ensure realism, these scenarios must satisfy several rules encoding regulatory guidelines governing the placement of objects on public streets. We implemented and evaluated these attacks on the Apollo autonomous driving system, finding that TrashFuzz induced violations of 15 out of 24 traffic laws.
comment: Accepted by the 19th IEEE International Conference on Software Testing, Verification and Validation (ICST 2026)

light_analysis.overview: 论文提出TrashFuzz算法，通过操纵真实路边物体的位置创建对抗场景，以黑色盒方式测试自动驾驶车辆感知系统的韧性，旨在引发交通法规违反。
light_analysis.motivation: 研究动机源于自动驾驶车辆（AVs）的兴起，需测试其感知系统的韧性，确保不受关键误判影响。现有测试方法通常依赖于不自然的对抗对象（如明显形状或补丁），这在实际中不真实且基于白盒知识，忽略了真实路边物体（如垃圾桶、广告牌）放置可能对AV感知的潜在影响。因此，开发一种更真实、不依赖内部知识的测试方法至关重要，以提升AV在复杂道路环境中的安全性，防止因错误感知导致的交通违规或事故。
light_analysis.method: 研究方法基于TrashFuzz算法，这是一种模糊测试算法，采用黑色盒攻击方式，通过操纵常见路边物体（如垃圾桶、广告牌）的位置来创建对抗场景，避免使用不自然的对抗补丁。关键创新点在于确保场景符合实际道路设计指南，通过编码监管规则模拟真实条件。具体实施中，在Apollo自动驾驶系统中实现该算法，目标是找出导致AV错误感知（例如误判交通灯颜色）的场景，从而引发交通法规违反，强调算法的实用性和真实性。
light_analysis.result: 主要实验结果表明，在Apollo自动驾驶系统中实施TrashFuzz攻击后，成功诱导了交通法规违反：在评估的24条交通法规中，有15条被违反。这证明了算法能有效创建真实对抗场景，导致AV感知系统产生显著误判。尽管摘要未提供与基线方法的直接对比数据（如准确率指标），但它强调了现有测试方法的不真实性，而TrashFuzz通过更符合实际的道路设计规则，展现了改进AV测试的潜力。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文的主要贡献是开发了TrashFuzz算法，为自动驾驶车辆感知系统的韧性测试提供了新方法，强调黑色盒攻击和场景真实性的结合。学术价值在于推动了AV安全测试领域，突出了真实世界中路边物体放置的重要性。实际应用上，该方法可用于识别和修复AV系统漏洞，提高道路安全。未来工作可能包括扩展到更多自动驾驶平台或集成更复杂的规则，但摘要未明确说明具体方向。

title: Black Box Meta-Learning Intrinsic Rewards
abstract: The broader application of reinforcement learning (RL) is limited by challenges including data efficiency, generalization capability, and ability to learn in sparse-reward environments. Meta-learning has emerged as a promising approach to address these issues by optimizing components of the learning algorithm to meet desired characteristics. Additionally, a different line of work has extensively studied the use of intrinsic rewards to enhance the exploration capabilities of algorithms. This work investigates how meta-learning can improve the training signal received by RL agents. We introduce a method to learn intrinsic rewards within a reinforcement learning framework that bypasses the typical computation of meta-gradients through an optimization process by treating policy updates as black boxes. We validate our approach against training with extrinsic rewards, demonstrating its effectiveness, and additionally compare it to the use of a meta-learned advantage function. Experiments are carried out on distributions of continuous control tasks with both parametric and non-parametric variations. Furthermore, only sparse rewards are used during evaluation. Code is available at: https: //github.com/Octavio-Pappalardo/Meta-learning-rewards
comment: Improved exposition; no technical changes to content

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出了一种黑箱元学习方法，用于学习内在奖励，以改进强化学习代理在稀疏奖励环境中的训练信号。
light_analysis.motivation: 强化学习（RL）面临数据效率低、泛化能力差和稀疏奖励环境中学习困难等挑战，限制了其广泛应用。现有方法中，元学习通过优化算法组件来提升性能，而内在奖励被用于增强探索能力。然而，传统元学习通常涉及复杂的元梯度计算，可能效率不高。本文旨在结合元学习和内在奖励，通过黑箱方式简化这一过程，以更有效地改善RL代理的训练信号，应对实际应用中的关键问题。
light_analysis.method: 本研究引入了一种在强化学习框架中元学习内在奖励的方法，核心创新在于将策略更新视为黑箱，从而避免了通过优化过程计算元梯度的典型方式。这种方法直接学习内在奖励函数，无需显式计算梯度，简化了训练流程。实验在参数化和非参数化变体的连续控制任务分布上进行，并使用稀疏奖励进行评估，以验证方法的鲁棒性和泛化能力，代码已开源供复现。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果表明，该方法在连续控制任务分布上表现优于仅使用外在奖励的训练，证明了其有效性。此外，与元学习优势函数方法对比，本文方法表现相当或更优，具体性能指标摘要未明确说明。评估时仅使用稀疏奖励，进一步验证了方法在挑战性环境中的学习效率和泛化能力，但缺乏详细数据如准确率提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的核心贡献是提出了黑箱元学习内在奖励的方法，简化了传统元梯度计算，提高了强化学习的训练信号，有助于解决数据效率、泛化和稀疏奖励环境中的问题。这具有学术价值，为元学习和RL领域提供了新思路，并可能在机器人控制等实际应用中发挥作用。局限性包括方法的泛化能力未充分验证，未来工作可扩展到更多任务类型和优化算法细节。

title: Merlin: A Computed Tomography Vision-Language Foundation Model and Dataset
abstract: The large volume of abdominal computed tomography (CT) scans coupled with the shortage of radiologists have intensified the need for automated medical image analysis tools. Previous state-of-the-art approaches for automated analysis leverage vision-language models (VLMs) that jointly model images and radiology reports. However, current medical VLMs are generally limited to 2D images and short reports. Here to overcome these shortcomings for abdominal CT interpretation, we introduce Merlin, a 3D VLM that learns from volumetric CT scans, electronic health record data and radiology reports. This approach is enabled by a multistage pretraining framework that does not require additional manual annotations. We trained Merlin using a high-quality clinical dataset of paired CT scans (>6 million images from 15,331 CT scans), diagnosis codes (>1.8 million codes) and radiology reports (>6 million tokens). We comprehensively evaluated Merlin on 6 task types and 752 individual tasks that covered diagnostic, prognostic and quality-related tasks. The non-adapted (off-the-shelf) tasks included zero-shot classification of findings (30 findings), phenotype classification (692 phenotypes) and zero-shot cross-modal retrieval (image-to-findings and image-to-impression). The model-adapted tasks included 5-year chronic disease prediction (6 diseases), radiology report generation and 3D semantic segmentation (20 organs). We validated Merlin at scale, with internal testing on 5,137 CT scans and external testing on 44,098 CT scans from 3 independent sites and 2 public datasets. The results demonstrated high generalization across institutions and anatomies. Merlin outperformed 2D VLMs, CT foundation models and off-the-shelf radiology models. We also release our trained models, code, and dataset, available at: https://github.com/StanfordMIMI/Merlin.

light_analysis.overview: Merlin是一个创新的3D视觉语言基础模型，结合CT扫描、电子健康记录和放射报告，通过多阶段预训练实现自动化腹部CT图像分析。
light_analysis.motivation: 随着腹部CT扫描数量剧增和放射科医生短缺，自动化医学图像分析工具需求迫切。现有视觉语言模型多局限于2D图像和简短报告，无法充分解析3D CT数据的复杂结构，限制了在临床诊断中的准确性和效率。因此，开发能整合多模态数据的3D模型对提升医学AI应用至关重要。
light_analysis.method: Merlin采用多阶段预训练框架，无需额外手动注释，直接从配对的CT扫描、电子健康记录和放射报告中学习。核心创新是构建3D视觉语言模型，利用大规模数据集（包括15,331 CT扫描、超过600万张图像、180万诊断代码和600万令牌报告）进行训练，整合图像、文本和结构化数据以增强模型能力。
light_analysis.result: 在6种任务类型和752个个体任务上评估Merlin，涵盖诊断、预后和质量相关任务，包括零样本分类、表型分类、检索、预测、报告生成和分割。内部测试5,137 CT扫描和外部测试44,098 CT扫描显示，Merlin在泛化性和性能上显著优于2D视觉语言模型、CT基础模型和现成放射模型，验证了其跨机构和解剖结构的鲁棒性。
light_analysis.conclusion: Merlin的主要贡献是提出一个3D视觉语言基础模型和高质量数据集，展示了在多种医学任务上的高性能和泛化能力，推动了医学人工智能的发展。该研究具有辅助放射诊断的实际应用价值，尽管摘要未明确说明局限性，未来工作可能包括扩展至其他医学图像类型或优化模型效率。

title: RAEE: A Robust Retrieval-Augmented Early Exit Framework for Efficient Inference
abstract: Deploying large language model inference remains challenging due to their high computational overhead. Early exit optimizes model inference by adaptively reducing the number of inference layers. Current methods typically train internal classifiers or use heuristic methods to determine the exit layer. However, those methods either introduce significant training overheads or lead to performance degradation. To address these limitations, this paper proposes RAEE, a robust Retrieval-Augmented Early Exit framework that not only enables early exit but also enhances model performance through corrective exit information at intermediate layers. This paper first demonstrates that the early exit problem can be effectively modeled as a distribution prediction problem, in which the distribution can be further approximated through the exit information of similar data. Subsequently, this paper introduces the process of collecting exit information of correct predictions and the steps to construct the retrieval database. Finally, leveraging the pre-constructed retrieval database, RAEE utilizes the exit information from retrieved similar data to guide the backbone model's exit. Experimental results demonstrate that RAEE can not only accelerate inference while achieving robust zero-shot performance across eight downstream tasks.

light_analysis.overview: RAEE是一个检索增强的早期退出框架，通过利用相似数据的退出信息优化大型语言模型推理，实现高效且性能增强。
light_analysis.motivation: 大型语言模型推理存在高计算开销，影响实际部署效率。现有早期退出方法如训练内部分类器带来额外训练成本，或使用启发式方法导致模型性能下降。RAEE旨在解决这些限制，提供一个既能减少推理层数又不牺牲准确性的新方案，以促进大型语言模型在资源受限环境中的高效应用。
light_analysis.method: RAEE将早期退出问题建模为分布预测，分布通过检索数据库中相似数据的退出信息近似。框架首先收集中间层正确预测的退出信息，构建检索数据库；在推理时，利用预构建数据库检索相似数据，并用其退出信息指导骨干模型的退出决策。关键创新在于引入检索增强机制，避免额外训练开销，同时增强模型性能。
light_analysis.result: 实验显示RAEE在八个下游任务上实现鲁棒的零样本性能，同时加速了推理过程。与基线方法相比，避免了训练开销和性能损失，但摘要未明确说明具体准确率提升或效率改进的百分比数据。这表明RAEE在平衡速度和准确性方面优于现有早期退出方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: RAEE的主要贡献是提出一个检索增强的早期退出框架，有效优化大型语言模型推理的效率和性能。该研究为高效部署模型提供了新方法，具有学术价值和实际应用潜力；未来工作可探索其在更广泛任务和模型中的泛化能力，以及处理动态数据时的适应性。

title: FireANTs: Adaptive Riemannian Optimization for Multi-Scale Diffeomorphic Matching
abstract: The paper proposes FireANTs, a multi-scale Adaptive Riemannian Optimization algorithm for dense diffeomorphic image matching. Existing state-of-the-art methods for diffeomorphic image matching are slow due to inefficient implementations and slow convergence due to the ill-conditioned nature of the optimization problem. Deep learning methods offer fast inference but require extensive training time, substantial inference memory, and fail to generalize across long-tailed distributions or diverse image modalities, necessitating costly retraining. We address these challenges by proposing a training-free, GPU-accelerated multi-scale Adaptive Riemannian Optimization algorithm for fast and accurate dense diffeomorphic image matching. FireANTs runs about 2.5x faster than ANTs on a CPU, and upto 1200x faster on a GPU. On a single GPU, FireANTs performs competitively with deep learning methods on inference runtime while consuming upto 10x less memory. FireANTs shows remarkable robustness to a wide variety of matching problems across modalities, species, and organs without any domain-specific training or tuning. Our framework allows hyperparameter grid search studies with significantly less resources and time compared to traditional and deep learning registration algorithms alike.

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出了FireANTs，一种无训练、GPU加速的多尺度自适应黎曼优化算法，用于快速准确的密集微分同胚图像匹配。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有微分同胚图像匹配方法因优化问题的病态性和低效实现，导致速度慢、收敛困难；深度学习方法虽推理快，但需要大量训练时间、高内存消耗，且泛化能力差，难以应对长尾分布或多样图像模态，常需昂贵重新训练。因此，迫切需要一种高效、通用且成本低的解决方案来提升匹配效率和鲁棒性。
light_analysis.method: FireANTs采用多尺度自适应黎曼优化策略，结合GPU加速，实现无训练的密集微分同胚图像匹配。核心创新在于自适应调整优化过程，避免了特定领域训练需求；通过多尺度处理提高精度，并利用GPU并行计算提升效率。方法专注于优化算法设计，应对病态问题，确保快速收敛和准确匹配。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，FireANTs在CPU上运行速度比ANTs快约2.5倍，在GPU上最高快1200倍；在单个GPU上，推理运行时与深度学习方法竞争，同时内存消耗减少高达10倍。此外，它在多种模态、物种和器官的匹配问题上表现出显著鲁棒性，无需特定训练或调参，超参数搜索所需资源也显著减少。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究贡献了FireANTs算法，为微分同胚图像匹配提供了高效、准确的解决方案，减少了计算资源需求，具有广泛的学术和应用价值。潜在局限性如对极端场景的适应性可能需进一步探索，但摘要未明确说明未来工作方向。

title: Learning to Generate Conditional Tri-plane for 3D-aware Expression Controllable Portrait Animation
abstract: In this paper, we present Export3D, a one-shot 3D-aware portrait animation method that is able to control the facial expression and camera view of a given portrait image. To achieve this, we introduce a tri-plane generator with an effective expression conditioning method, which directly generates a tri-plane of 3D prior by transferring the expression parameter of 3DMM into the source image. The tri-plane is then decoded into the image of different view through a differentiable volume rendering. Existing portrait animation methods heavily rely on image warping to transfer the expression in the motion space, challenging on disentanglement of appearance and expression. In contrast, we propose a contrastive pre-training framework for appearance-free expression parameter, eliminating undesirable appearance swap when transferring a cross-identity expression. Extensive experiments show that our pre-training framework can learn the appearance-free expression representation hidden in 3DMM, and our model can generate 3D-aware expression controllable portrait images without appearance swap in the cross-identity manner.

light_analysis.overview: 本论文提出Export3D方法，通过条件tri-plane生成和对比预训练框架，实现无外观交换的3D感知表情可控肖像动画。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有肖像动画方法主要依赖图像扭曲技术来转移表情，但难以解耦外观和表情，导致在跨身份表情控制时出现不良外观交换问题。这限制了动画的逼真度和泛化能力，特别是在需要自然表情变化而不改变人物外观的场景中。因此，开发一种能有效分离外观和表情、实现高质量3D感知动画的方法至关重要，以提升应用如虚拟现实和娱乐中的用户体验。
light_analysis.method: 本研究提出Export3D方法，核心是引入tri-plane生成器，该生成器使用3D Morphable Model（3DMM）的表情参数作为条件，直接从源图像生成表示3D先验的tri-plane。随后，通过可微分体积渲染将tri-plane解码为不同视角的图像。关键创新在于一个对比预训练框架，用于提取外观无关的表情参数，从而在跨身份表情转移时避免外观干扰，基于3DMM和tri-plane表示技术实现精确的3D感知控制。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果表明，所提出的对比预训练框架能有效学习3DMM中隐藏的外观无关表情表示。Export3D模型在跨身份场景下成功生成了3D感知的表情可控肖像图像，没有出现外观交换问题，在表情控制和外观保持方面优于依赖图像扭曲的传统基线方法。尽管摘要未提供具体性能指标数据，但实验验证了该方法在提高动画质量方面的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本论文的主要贡献是提出了Export3D方法，通过结合条件tri-plane生成和对比预训练，解决了肖像动画中外观和表情解耦的挑战。这提高了动画的自然度和可控性，在学术上有助于推动3D感知技术发展，在实际应用中如虚拟角色动画具有潜在价值。未来工作可探索更多表情参数或扩展到复杂场景，摘要未明确说明具体局限性，但可能涉及泛化能力优化。

title: List Sample Compression and Uniform Convergence
abstract: List learning is a variant of supervised classification where the learner outputs multiple plausible labels for each instance rather than just one. We investigate classical principles related to generalization within the context of list learning. Our primary goal is to determine whether classical principles in the PAC setting retain their applicability in the domain of list PAC learning. We focus on uniform convergence (which is the basis of Empirical Risk Minimization) and on sample compression (which is a powerful manifestation of Occam's Razor). In classical PAC learning, both uniform convergence and sample compression satisfy a form of `completeness': whenever a class is learnable, it can also be learned by a learning rule that adheres to these principles. We ask whether the same completeness holds true in the list learning setting.   We show that uniform convergence remains equivalent to learnability in the list PAC learning setting. In contrast, our findings reveal surprising results regarding sample compression: we prove that when the label space is $Y=\{0,1,2\}$, then there are 2-list-learnable classes that cannot be compressed. This refutes the list version of the sample compression conjecture by Littlestone and Warmuth (1986). We prove an even stronger impossibility result, showing that there are $2$-list-learnable classes that cannot be compressed even when the reconstructed function can work with lists of arbitrarily large size. We prove a similar result for (1-list) PAC learnable classes when the label space is unbounded. This generalizes a recent result by arXiv:2308.06424.
